================================================================================
FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\ComplianceApp\ComplianceApp\Services\Grpc\GrpcDataServiceAdapter.Firewall.cs
================================================================================
extern alias Proto;
using Proto::Compliance.V1;
using SharedDto = ComplianceApp.Shared.DTOs;
using SharedEnums = ComplianceApp.Shared.Enums;

namespace ComplianceApp.Services.Grpc;

public partial class GrpcDataServiceAdapter
{
    public async Task<SharedDto.SecurityCenterProduct?> GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct()
    {
        var r = await _client.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProductAsync(new GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProductRequest()).ConfigureAwait(false);
        return r.Product is not null ? MapSecurityCenterProduct(r.Product) : null;
    }

    public async Task<SharedDto.SecurityCenterProduct?> GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct()
    {
        var r = await _client.GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProductAsync(new GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProductRequest()).ConfigureAwait(false);
        return r.Product is not null ? MapSecurityCenterProduct(r.Product) : null;
    }

    public async Task<SharedDto.NetFwProduct[]> GetNetFwProducts()
    {
        var r = await _client.GetNetFwProductsAsync(new GetNetFwProductsRequest()).ConfigureAwait(false);
        var result = new SharedDto.NetFwProduct[r.Products.Count];
        for (var i = 0; i < r.Products.Count; i++)
        {
            var p = r.Products[i];
            result[i] = SharedDto.NetFwProduct.Create(p.Name, p.PathToSignedProductExe, [.. p.RuleCategories]);
        }
        return result;
    }

    public async Task<string?> GetNetConnectionProfileName()
    {
        var r = await _client.GetNetConnectionProfileNameAsync(new GetNetConnectionProfileNameRequest()).ConfigureAwait(false);
        return r.HasName ? r.Name : null;
    }

    public async Task<SharedEnums.FirewallState?> GetNetFirewallProfileState(string profilName)
    {
        var r = await _client.GetNetFirewallProfileStateAsync(new GetNetFirewallProfileStateRequest { ProfileName = profilName }).ConfigureAwait(false);
        return r.HasState ? (SharedEnums.FirewallState)(int)r.State : null;
    }

    public async Task<SharedDto.WfpEnrichedStateDto> GetWfpEnrichedState()
    {
        var r = await _client.GetWfpEnrichedStateAsync(new GetWfpEnrichedStateRequest()).ConfigureAwait(false);

        var engineOptions = r.EngineOptions
            .Select(o => new SharedDto.WfpEngineOptionDto(o.Name, o.Value, o.Description))
            .ToList();

        var filters = r.Filters.Select(MapDtoFilter).ToList();

        var netEvents = r.NetEvents
            .Select(e => new SharedDto.WfpEnrichedNetEventDto(
                e.Timestamp, e.EventType, e.IpVersion, (byte)e.IpProtocol,
                e.ProtocolName, e.LocalAddress, (ushort)e.LocalPort,
                e.RemoteAddress, (ushort)e.RemotePort,
                e.AppId, e.UserId,
                e.HasFilterId ? e.FilterId : null,
                e.HasLayerId ? (ushort)e.LayerId : null,
                e.LayerName, e.Flags, e.FlagsDecoded,
                e.Filter is not null ? MapDtoFilter(e.Filter) : null))
            .ToList();

        return new SharedDto.WfpEnrichedStateDto(engineOptions, filters, netEvents);
    }

    private static SharedDto.WfpEnrichedFilterDto MapDtoFilter(WfpEnrichedFilter f) => new(
        f.FilterKey, f.FilterId, f.Name, f.FlagsValue, f.Flags,
        f.EffectiveWeightNumeric, f.EffectiveWeight, f.ConditionsCount, f.ConditionsJson,
        f.Action, f.IsBoottime, f.HasClearActionRight,
        f.LayerKey, f.LayerName, (ushort)f.LayerOrder,
        f.SubLayerKey, f.SubLayerName, (ushort)f.SubLayerWeight,
        f.ProviderKey, f.ProviderName, f.ProviderDescription,
        f.CalloutKey, f.CalloutName,
        f.ProviderContextKey, f.ProviderContextName, f.ProviderContextId,
        f.ProviderContextType, f.ProviderContextTypeName,
        f.ProviderContextDataHex, f.ProviderContextDataBufferHex);

    private static SharedDto.SecurityCenterProduct MapSecurityCenterProduct(SecurityCenterProduct p) =>
        SharedDto.SecurityCenterProduct.Create(
            p.Name,
            p.PathToSignedProductExe,
            p.ProductState,
            uint.Parse(p.ProductStatus),
            uint.Parse(p.SignatureStatus),
            uint.Parse(p.ProductOwner));
}


================================================================================
FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\ComplianceApp\ComplianceApp\Services\WfpFilterPipeline.cs
================================================================================
using System;
using System.Collections.Frozen;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Net;
using System.Net.Sockets;
using System.Numerics;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Text.Json.Nodes;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.DTOs;

namespace ComplianceApp.Services;

internal sealed record WfpDeduplicatedFilter(
    string Direction,
    string Name,
    string ProviderName,
    string LayerNameNormalized,
    string SubLayerName,
    string Action,
    bool HasClearActionRight,
    string Conditions,
    string ConditionsJson,
    string FiltersJson,
    IReadOnlyList<WfpEnrichedFilterDto> Variants);

internal static partial class WfpFilterPipeline
{
    [GeneratedRegex(@"[_ ]?v[46]\b", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase)]
    private static partial Regex LayerVersionSuffix();

    [GeneratedRegex(@"S-1-[\d-]+")]
    private static partial Regex SidPattern();

    [GeneratedRegex(@";;;([A-Z]{2,})(?:[);\s]|$)")]
    private static partial Regex SddlAbbrevPattern();

    // ── Public API ──────────────────────────────────────────────

    public static WfpDeduplicatedFilter[] Deduplicate(IReadOnlyList<WfpEnrichedFilterDto> filters)
    {
        var ale = FilterAleFilters(filters);
        var ordered = ComputeFilterOrders(ale);
        var withIgnorance = ComputeFilterIgnorance(ordered);
        return DeduplicateFilters(withIgnorance);
    }

    public static string? SerializeFilter(WfpEnrichedFilterDto? filter)
    {
        if (filter is null) return null;

        var node = new JsonObject
        {
            ["FilterId"] = filter.FilterId,
            ["Name"] = filter.Name,
            ["EffectiveWeight"] = filter.EffectiveWeight,
            ["ConditionsCount"] = filter.ConditionsCount,
            ["Action"] = filter.Action,
            ["IsBoottime"] = filter.IsBoottime,
            ["HasClearActionRight"] = filter.HasClearActionRight,
            ["LayerName"] = filter.LayerName,
            ["SubLayerKey"] = filter.SubLayerKey,
            ["SubLayerName"] = filter.SubLayerName,
            ["ProviderKey"] = filter.ProviderKey,
            ["ProviderName"] = filter.ProviderName,
            ["CalloutName"] = filter.CalloutName,
            ["ProviderContextName"] = filter.ProviderContextName,
            ["ProviderContextId"] = filter.ProviderContextId,
            ["ProviderContextTypeName"] = filter.ProviderContextTypeName,
            ["ProviderContextDataHex"] = filter.ProviderContextDataHex,
            ["ProviderContextDataBufferHex"] = filter.ProviderContextDataBufferHex,
            ["ConditionsJson"] = filter.ConditionsJson
        };

        if (filter.ProviderName?.Equals("Illumio WPF Provider", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) is true)
        {
            var hex = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(filter.ProviderContextDataBufferHex)
                ? filter.ProviderContextDataBufferHex
                : filter.ProviderContextDataHex;
            node["ProviderDataBufferParsed"] = ParseIllumioHexBlob(hex);
        }

        return node.ToJsonString();
    }

    // ── Pipeline steps ──────────────────────────────────────────

    private static List<WfpEnrichedFilterDto> FilterAleFilters(IReadOnlyList<WfpEnrichedFilterDto> filters) => filters
        .Where(f => !f.Name.Contains("SentinelOne built-in rule -", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        .Where(f =>
            //f.LayerName.Contains("ALE_RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_V", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            f.LayerName.Contains("ALE_AUTH_LISTEN_V", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            f.LayerName.Contains("ALE_AUTH_CONNECT_V", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
            f.LayerName.Contains("ALE_AUTH_RECV_ACCEPT_V", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        .Where(f => !f.LayerName.Contains("_DISCARD", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        .Where(f => !f.SubLayerName.Contains("TEREDO", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        .Where(f => !f.SubLayerName.Contains("MPSSVC_APP_ISOLATION", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        .Where(f => !f.SubLayerName.Contains("MPSSVC_WSH", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        .Where(f => !f.Action.Contains("CALLOUT_INSPECTION", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        .ToList();

    private static List<WfpArbitratedFilter> ComputeFilterOrders(List<WfpEnrichedFilterDto> aleFilters) => aleFilters
        .OrderBy(f => f.LayerOrder)
        .ThenByDescending(f => f.SubLayerWeight)
        .ThenByDescending(f => f.EffectiveWeightNumeric)
        .Select((f, i) => new WfpArbitratedFilter(f,
            OrderId: i + 1,
            Conditions: FormatFilterLogicCompact(f),
            ProviderDataBufferParsed: ParseIllumioHexBlob(
                !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(f.ProviderContextDataBufferHex) ? f.ProviderContextDataBufferHex
                : f.ProviderContextDataHex ?? ""),
            IsIgnored: false,
            IgnoredReason: ""))
        .ToList();

    private static List<WfpArbitratedFilter> ComputeFilterIgnorance(List<WfpArbitratedFilter> orderedFilters) => orderedFilters
        .Select((f, index) =>
        {
            var (isIgnored, reason) = DetermineIfFilterIsIgnored(f, orderedFilters, index);
            return f with { IsIgnored = isIgnored, IgnoredReason = reason };
        })
        .ToList();

    private static (bool IsIgnored, string Reason) DetermineIfFilterIsIgnored(
        WfpArbitratedFilter current,
        List<WfpArbitratedFilter> allFilters,
        int currentIndex)
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < currentIndex; i++)
        {
            var prev = allFilters[i];
            if (prev.LayerName != current.LayerName) continue;
            if (prev.SubLayerName != current.SubLayerName) continue;
            if (current.IsBoottime != prev.IsBoottime) continue;
            if (prev.ConditionsCount != 0) continue;

            bool isTerminating =
                prev.Action.Contains("PERMIT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                prev.Action.Contains("BLOCK", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                prev.Action.Contains("CALLOUT_TERMINATING", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                prev.Action.Contains("CALLOUT_UNKNOWN", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (!isTerminating) continue;

            string boottimeTag = current.IsBoottime ? " [BOOTTIME]" : "";
            return (true, $"Shadowed by FilterId {prev.FilterId} (same sublayer, ANY conditions, {prev.Action}){boottimeTag}");
        }
        return (false, string.Empty);
    }

    private static WfpDeduplicatedFilter[] DeduplicateFilters(List<WfpArbitratedFilter> orderedFilters) => orderedFilters
        .Where(x => !x.IsIgnored)
        .GroupBy(x => (
            x.Name,
            LayerNorm: NormalizeLayerName(x.LayerName),
            SubLayer: x.SubLayerName,
            x.Action,
            Conditions: x.ConditionsJson))
        .Select(g =>
        {
            var first = g.MaxBy(f => f.EffectiveWeightNumeric)!;
            var direction = GetLayerDirection(first.LayerName);

            var variantsObj = new JsonObject();
            foreach (var f in g)
            {
                var v = f.Filter.LayerName.Contains("_V4", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? "V4" : "V6";
                if (f.IsBoottime) v += "_Boottime";
                variantsObj[v] = new JsonObject
                {
                    ["FilterId"] = f.FilterId,
                    ["ProviderContextDataBufferHex"] = f.Filter.ProviderContextDataBufferHex,
                    ["ProviderDataBufferParsed"] = f.ProviderDataBufferParsed
                };
            }

            return (
                _directionOrder: DirectionOrder(direction),
                _subLayerWeight: first.SubLayerWeight,
                _effectiveWeight: g.Max(f => f.EffectiveWeightNumeric),
                Direction: direction,
                Name: g.Key.Name,
                first.ProviderName,
                LayerNameNormalized: g.Key.LayerNorm,
                SubLayerName: g.Key.SubLayer,
                Action: g.Key.Action,
                first.HasClearActionRight,
                Conditions: first.Conditions,
                ConditionsJson: g.Key.Conditions,
                FiltersJson: variantsObj.ToJsonString(),
                Variants: (IReadOnlyList<WfpEnrichedFilterDto>)g.Select(f => f.Filter).ToList());
        })
        .OrderBy(x => x._directionOrder)
        .ThenByDescending(x => x._subLayerWeight)
        .ThenByDescending(x => x._effectiveWeight)
        .Select(x => new WfpDeduplicatedFilter(
            x.Direction, x.Name, x.ProviderName, x.LayerNameNormalized, x.SubLayerName,
            x.Action, x.HasClearActionRight, x.Conditions, x.ConditionsJson, x.FiltersJson,
            x.Variants))
        .ToArray();

    private static string NormalizeLayerName(string layerName) => LayerVersionSuffix().Replace(layerName, "");

    private static int DirectionOrder(string direction) => direction switch
    {
        "Inbound" => 0, "Both" => 1, "Outbound" => 2, _ => 3
    };

    // ── Condition formatting ────────────────────────────────────

    public static string FormatFilterLogicCompact(WfpEnrichedFilterDto filter)
    {
        if (filter.ConditionsCount == 0)
            return "ANY";

        var conditions = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<Dictionary<string, JsonElement>>>(filter.ConditionsJson)!;

        var parts = conditions
            .GroupBy(c => c["fieldKey"].GetString()!)
            .Select(g =>
            {
                var key = g.Key.Replace("ALE_", "").Replace("IP_", "");

                if (g.Count() == 1)
                {
                    var cond = g.First();
                    var matchType = cond["matchType"].GetString()!;
                    var value = GetConditionValueCompact(cond).Replace("FWP_CONDITION_", "").Replace("FLAG_IS_", "");
                    return $"{key}{GetMatchSymbol(matchType)}'{value}'";
                }

                var values = g.Select(GetConditionValueCompact);
                return $"{key} \u2208 {{{string.Join(",", values)}}}";
            });

        return string.Join(" & ", parts);
    }

    private static string GetMatchSymbol(string matchType) => matchType switch
    {
        "EQUAL" => "=",
        "NOT_EQUAL" => "\u2260",
        "GREATER" => ">",
        "LESS" => "<",
        "GREATER_OR_EQUAL" => "\u2265",
        "LESS_OR_EQUAL" => "\u2264",
        "RANGE" => " \u2208 ",
        "FLAGS_ALL_SET" => " has ",
        "FLAGS_ANY_SET" => " has-any ",
        "FLAGS_NONE_SET" => " has-none ",
        "PREFIX" => "~",
        "NOT_PREFIX" => "!~",
        "EQUAL_CASE_INSENSITIVE" => "\u2248",
        _ => "="
    };

    private static string GetConditionValueCompact(Dictionary<string, JsonElement> condition)
    {
        var fieldKey = condition["fieldKey"].GetString()!;
        var value = condition["conditionValue"];

        return value switch
        {
            _ when value.TryGetProperty("type", out var type) && type.ValueEquals("UINT32")
                && value.TryGetProperty("value", out var numVal) && numVal.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Number
                => FormatUInt32Value(fieldKey, numVal.GetUInt32()),

            _ when value.TryGetProperty("type", out var type2) && type2.ValueEquals("UINT8")
                && value.TryGetProperty("value", out var byteVal) && byteVal.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Number
                => fieldKey is "IP_PROTOCOL" ? GetProtocolName((int)byteVal.GetUInt32()) : byteVal.ToString(),

            _ when value.TryGetProperty("type", out var sdType) && sdType.ValueEquals("SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR")
                && value.TryGetProperty("sd", out var sd)
                => ResolveSidFromSddl(sd.GetString()!),

            _ when value.TryGetProperty("type", out var sidType) && sidType.ValueEquals("SID")
                && value.TryGetProperty("sid", out var sid)
                => value.TryGetProperty("name", out var name) && !name.ValueEquals("null")
                    ? $"{name.GetString()}({sid.GetString()})"
                    : sid.GetString()!,

            _ when value.TryGetProperty("type", out var blobType) && blobType.ValueEquals("BYTE_BLOB")
                && value.TryGetProperty("asString", out var str)
                => str.GetString()!,

            _ when value.TryGetProperty("addr", out var addr)
                => FormatIpAddress(value, addr.GetString()!),

            _ when value.TryGetProperty("valueLow", out var low) && value.TryGetProperty("valueHigh", out var high)
                => FormatRange(low, high),

            _ when value.TryGetProperty("value", out var val)
                => val.ToString(),

            _ when value.TryGetProperty("type", out var fallbackType)
                => value.TryGetProperty("value", out var fallbackVal)
                    ? $"{fallbackType.GetString()}({fallbackVal})"
                    : $"{fallbackType.GetString()}({value.GetRawText()})",

            _ => "?"
        };
    }

    private static string FormatUInt32Value(string fieldKey, uint value) => fieldKey switch
    {
        "ORIGINAL_ICMP_TYPE" or "ICMP_TYPE" => GetIcmpTypeName(value),
        "COMPARTMENT_ID" => value == 0 ? $"HOST_{value}" : $"VM/CONTAINER_{value}",
        "REAUTHORIZE_REASON" => GetReauthorizeReasonName(value),
        "FLAGS" => DecodeBitmask(value, s_conditionFlags, "NONE"),
        _ when fieldKey.Contains("PROFILE_ID") => GetNetworkProfileName(value),
        _ when fieldKey.Contains("INTERFACE_TYPE") => GetInterfaceTypeName(value),
        _ when fieldKey.Contains("TUNNEL_TYPE") => GetTunnelTypeName(value),
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    private static string FormatIpAddress(JsonElement value, string addrStr)
    {
        if (value.TryGetProperty("prefixLength", out var prefix))
        {
            int pfx = prefix.GetInt32();
            return pfx == 128 ? SimplifyIPv6(addrStr) : $"{SimplifyIPv6(addrStr)}/{pfx}";
        }

        if (value.TryGetProperty("mask", out var mask))
        {
            string maskStr = mask.GetString()!;
            return MaskToCIDR(maskStr) switch
            {
                32 => addrStr,
                > 0 and var cidr => $"{addrStr}/{cidr}",
                _ => $"{addrStr}/{maskStr}"
            };
        }

        return SimplifyIPv6(addrStr);
    }

    private static string FormatRange(JsonElement low, JsonElement high) => (low.ValueKind, high.ValueKind) switch
    {
        (JsonValueKind.Number, JsonValueKind.Number) =>
            low.GetInt32() == high.GetInt32() ? $"{low.GetInt32()}" : $"{low.GetInt32()}-{high.GetInt32()}",

        (JsonValueKind.String, JsonValueKind.String) =>
            IsIPv6Subnet(low.GetString()!, high.GetString()!, out var subnet) ? subnet!
            : low.GetString() == high.GetString() ? low.GetString()!
            : $"{low.GetString()}-{high.GetString()}",

        _ => $"{low}-{high}"
    };

    // ── SID / SDDL resolution ──────────────────────────────────

    private static readonly FrozenDictionary<string, string> s_abbreviatedSids = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
    {
        ["WD"] = "AUTHORITY\\Everyone",       ["BA"] = "BUILTIN\\Administrators",
        ["BU"] = "BUILTIN\\Users",            ["BG"] = "BUILTIN\\Guests",
        ["BO"] = "BUILTIN\\Backup Operators", ["SY"] = "AUTHORITY\\System",
        ["LS"] = "AUTHORITY\\Local Service",   ["NS"] = "AUTHORITY\\Network Service",
        ["PU"] = "BUILTIN\\Power Users",      ["AU"] = "AUTHORITY\\Authenticated Users",
        ["AN"] = "AUTHORITY\\Anonymous",       ["ED"] = "AUTHORITY\\Enterprise Domain Controllers",
        ["PA"] = "BUILTIN\\Group Policy Creator Owners",
        ["DG"] = "AUTHORITY\\Domain Guests",   ["DU"] = "AUTHORITY\\Domain Users",
        ["DC"] = "AUTHORITY\\Domain Computers", ["DD"] = "AUTHORITY\\Domain Controllers",
        ["DA"] = "AUTHORITY\\Domain Admins",   ["EA"] = "AUTHORITY\\Enterprise Admins",
        ["SA"] = "AUTHORITY\\Schema Admins",   ["CA"] = "BUILTIN\\Cert Publishers",
        ["RD"] = "BUILTIN\\Remote Desktop Users",
        ["RO"] = "AUTHORITY\\Enterprise Read-only Domain Controllers",
        ["OW"] = "AUTHORITY\\Owner Rights",    ["CO"] = "AUTHORITY\\Creator Owner",
    }.ToFrozenDictionary(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private static string ResolveSidFromSddl(string sddl)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(sddl)) return sddl;

        var resolvedItems = new List<string>();

        foreach (Match match in SidPattern().Matches(sddl))
            resolvedItems.Add(match.Value);

        foreach (Match match in SddlAbbrevPattern().Matches(sddl))
        {
            var abbrev = match.Groups[1].Value;
            if (s_abbreviatedSids.TryGetValue(abbrev, out var resolved))
                resolvedItems.Add(resolved);
            else if (abbrev is not "NO_ACCESS_CONTROL")
                resolvedItems.Add(abbrev);
        }

        if (resolvedItems.Count == 0)
            return sddl.Contains("NO_ACCESS_CONTROL", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? "NO_ACCESS_CONTROL" : sddl;

        return resolvedItems.Count == 1 ? resolvedItems[0] : $"{{{string.Join(", ", resolvedItems)}}}";
    }

    // ── Lookup helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────

    private static string GetIcmpTypeName(uint type) => type switch
    {
        0 => "ICMP4_ECHO_REPLY", 3 => "ICMP4_DST_UNREACH", 4 => "ICMP4_SOURCE_QUENCH",
        5 => "ICMP4_REDIRECT", 8 => "ICMP4_ECHO_REQUEST", 9 => "ICMP4_ROUTER_ADVERT",
        10 => "ICMP4_ROUTER_SOLICIT", 11 => "ICMP4_TIME_EXCEEDED", 12 => "ICMP4_PARAM_PROB",
        13 => "ICMP4_TIMESTAMP_REQUEST", 14 => "ICMP4_TIMESTAMP_REPLY",
        16 => "ICMP4_MASK_REQUEST", 18 => "ICMP4_MASK_REPLY",
        128 => "ICMP6_ECHO_REQUEST", 129 => "ICMP6_ECHO_REPLY",
        130 => "ICMP6_MEMBERSHIP_QUERY", 131 => "ICMP6_MEMBERSHIP_REPORT",
        132 => "ICMP6_MEMBERSHIP_REDUCTION", 133 => "ND_ROUTER_SOLICIT",
        134 => "ND_ROUTER_ADVERT", 135 => "ND_NEIGHBOR_SOLICIT",
        136 => "ND_NEIGHBOR_ADVERT", 137 => "ND_REDIRECT",
        138 => "ICMP6_V2_MEMBERSHIP_REPORT",
        _ => type.ToString()
    };

    private static string GetNetworkProfileName(uint profile) => profile switch
    {
        0 => "ANY", 1 => "PUBLIC", 2 => "PRIVATE", 3 => "DOMAIN",
        _ => $"PROFILE_{profile}"
    };

    private static string GetInterfaceTypeName(uint type) => type switch
    {
        1 => "OTHER", 6 => "ETHERNET_CSMACD", 9 => "ISO88025_TOKENRING",
        15 => "FDDI", 23 => "PPP", 24 => "SOFTWARE_LOOPBACK", 37 => "ATM",
        71 => "IEEE80211", 131 => "TUNNEL", 144 => "IEEE1394",
        237 => "IEEE80216_WMAN", 243 => "WWANPP", 244 => "WWANPP2",
        _ => $"IF_TYPE_{type}"
    };

    private static string GetTunnelTypeName(uint type) => type switch
    {
        0 => "NONE", 1 => "OTHER", 2 => "DIRECT", 11 => "6TO4",
        13 => "ISATAP", 14 => "TEREDO", 15 => "IPHTTPS",
        _ => $"TUNNEL_TYPE_{type}"
    };

    private static string GetProtocolName(int protocolNumber) => protocolNumber switch
    {
        0 => "HOPOPTS", 1 => "ICMP", 2 => "IGMP", 3 => "GGP", 4 => "IPV4",
        5 => "ST", 6 => "TCP", 7 => "CBT", 8 => "EGP", 9 => "IGP",
        12 => "PUP", 17 => "UDP", 22 => "IDP", 27 => "RDP", 41 => "IPV6",
        43 => "ROUTING", 44 => "FRAGMENT", 50 => "ESP", 51 => "AH",
        58 => "ICMPV6", 59 => "NONE", 60 => "DSTOPTS", 77 => "ND",
        78 => "ICLFXBM", 103 => "PIM", 113 => "PGM", 115 => "L2TP",
        132 => "SCTP", 255 => "RAW", 257 => "RESERVED_RAW",
        258 => "RESERVED_IPSEC", 259 => "RESERVED_IPSECOFFLOAD", 260 => "RESERVED_WNV",
        _ => $"IPPROTO_UNKNOWN_{protocolNumber}"
    };

    // ── Bitmask decoding ────────────────────────────────────────

    private static readonly FrozenDictionary<uint, string> s_conditionFlags = new Dictionary<uint, string>
    {
        [0x00000001] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_LOOPBACK",
        [0x00000002] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_IPSEC_SECURED",
        [0x00000004] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_REAUTHORIZE",
        [0x00000008] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_WILDCARD_BIND",
        [0x00000010] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_RAW_ENDPOINT",
        [0x00000020] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_FRAGMENT",
        [0x00000040] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_FRAGMENT_GROUP",
        [0x00000080] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_IPSEC_NATT_RECLASSIFY",
        [0x00000100] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_REQUIRES_ALE_CLASSIFY",
        [0x00000200] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_IMPLICIT_BIND",
        [0x00000400] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_REASSEMBLED",
        [0x00004000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_NAME_APP_SPECIFIED",
        [0x00008000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_PROMISCUOUS",
        [0x00010000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_AUTH_FW",
        [0x00020000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_RECLASSIFY",
        [0x00040000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_OUTBOUND_PASS_THRU",
        [0x00080000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_INBOUND_PASS_THRU",
        [0x00100000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_CONNECTION_REDIRECTED",
        [0x00200000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_PROXY_CONNECTION",
        [0x00400000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_APPCONTAINER_LOOPBACK",
        [0x00800000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_NON_APPCONTAINER_LOOPBACK",
        [0x01000000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_RESERVED",
        [0x02000000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_HONORING_POLICY_AUTHORIZE",
        [0x04000000] = "FWP_CONDITION_FLAG_IS_RESERVED2",
    }.ToFrozenDictionary();

    private static readonly FrozenDictionary<uint, string> s_reauthorizeReasons = new Dictionary<uint, string>
    {
        [0x00000001] = "POLICY_CHANGE",
        [0x00000002] = "NEW_ARRIVAL_INTERFACE",
        [0x00000004] = "NEW_NEXTHOP_INTERFACE",
        [0x00000008] = "PROFILE_CROSSING",
        [0x00000010] = "CLASSIFY_COMPLETION",
        [0x00000020] = "IPSEC_PROPERTIES_CHANGED",
        [0x00000040] = "MID_STREAM_INSPECTION",
        [0x00000080] = "SOCKET_PROPERTY_CHANGED",
        [0x00000100] = "NEW_INBOUND_MCAST_BCAST_PACKET",
        [0x00000200] = "EDP_POLICY_CHANGED",
        [0x00004000] = "PROXY_HANDLE_CHANGED",
        [0x00010000] = "CHECK_OFFLOAD",
    }.ToFrozenDictionary();

    private static string GetReauthorizeReasonName(uint reason) =>
        reason == 0 ? "UNKNOWN" : DecodeBitmask(reason, s_reauthorizeReasons, $"FWP_CONDITION_REAUTHORIZE_REASON_UNKNOWN_0x{reason:X}");

    private static string DecodeBitmask(uint value, FrozenDictionary<uint, string> flags, string fallback)
    {
        if (value == 0) return fallback;
        var decoded = string.Join(" | ", flags
            .Where(kvp => (value & kvp.Key) != 0)
            .OrderBy(kvp => kvp.Key)
            .Select(kvp => kvp.Value));
        return decoded.Length > 0 ? decoded : $"0x{value:X}";
    }

    // ── IP / Network helpers ────────────────────────────────────

    private static bool IsIPv6Subnet(string low, string high, out string? subnet)
    {
        subnet = null;
        if (!IPAddress.TryParse(low, out var lowIP) || !IPAddress.TryParse(high, out var highIP))
            return false;
        if (lowIP.AddressFamily is not AddressFamily.InterNetworkV6)
            return false;

        byte[] lowBytes = lowIP.GetAddressBytes(), highBytes = highIP.GetAddressBytes();

        int prefixLength = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < 16; i++)
        {
            byte xor = (byte)(lowBytes[i] ^ highBytes[i]);
            if (xor == 0) { prefixLength += 8; continue; }
            for (int bit = 7; bit >= 0; bit--)
            {
                if (((xor >> bit) & 1) == 0) prefixLength++;
                else break;
            }
            break;
        }

        int byteIndex = prefixLength / 8, bitIndex = prefixLength % 8;
        bool isSubnet = true;

        if (bitIndex > 0)
        {
            byte mask = (byte)((1 << (8 - bitIndex)) - 1);
            if ((highBytes[byteIndex] & mask) != mask) isSubnet = false;
            byteIndex++;
        }

        for (int i = byteIndex; i < 16 && isSubnet; i++)
            if (highBytes[i] != 0xFF) isSubnet = false;

        for (int i = byteIndex; i < 16 && isSubnet; i++)
            if (lowBytes[i] != 0x00) isSubnet = false;

        if (!isSubnet) return false;
        subnet = $"{SimplifyIPv6(low)}/{prefixLength}";
        return true;
    }

    private static int? MaskToCIDR(string mask)
    {
        var parts = mask.Split('.');
        if (parts.Length != 4) return null;

        uint maskInt = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            if (!byte.TryParse(parts[i], out byte b)) return null;
            maskInt = (maskInt << 8) | b;
        }

        int bits = 0;
        for (int i = 31; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            if ((maskInt & (1u << i)) != 0) bits++;
            else break;
        }

        uint expected = bits == 0 ? 0 : (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - bits));
        return maskInt != expected ? null : bits;
    }

    private static string SimplifyIPv6(string addr) =>
        string.IsNullOrEmpty(addr) ? addr
        : IPAddress.TryParse(addr, out var ip) ? ip.ToString()
        : addr;

    // ── Illumio hex blob parsing ────────────────────────────────

    public static string ParseIllumioHexBlob(string hexString)
    {
        try
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(hexString)) return "";
            var hex = hexString.Replace(" ", "").Replace("-", "").Replace("0x", "");
            if (hex.Length < 2 || hex.Length % 2 != 0) return "";
            return string.Join(", ", ParseIllumioIPs(Convert.FromHexString(hex)));
        }
        catch { return ""; }
    }

    private static List<string> ParseIllumioIPs(byte[] data)
    {
        try
        {
            if (data is not { Length: >= 12 } || data[0] != 0x02 || data[1] != 0x00)
                return [];

            var entryType = BitConverter.ToUInt16(data, 2);
            if (entryType is not (0x0001 or 0x0010 or 0x0011 or 0x0015))
                return [];

            var count = (int)BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, 4);
            if (count == 0) return ["*"];

            var ips = new List<string>(count);
            var pos = 12;

            switch (entryType)
            {
                case 0x0001 or 0x0010:
                    for (int i = 0; i < count && pos + 8 <= data.Length; i++, pos += 8)
                    {
                        ReadOnlySpan<byte> ipBytes = [data[pos + 3], data[pos + 2], data[pos + 1], data[pos]];
                        var ip = new IPAddress(ipBytes);
                        int cidr = BitOperations.PopCount(BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, pos + 4));
                        ips.Add(cidr < 32 ? $"{ip}/{cidr}" : $"{ip}");
                    }
                    break;

                case 0x0011:
                    for (int i = 0; i < count && pos + 8 <= data.Length; i++, pos += 8)
                    {
                        ReadOnlySpan<byte> ipBytes = [data[pos + 3], data[pos + 2], data[pos + 1], data[pos]];
                        var ip = new IPAddress(ipBytes);
                        int cidr = 24 + BitOperations.PopCount((uint)data[pos + 4]);
                        ips.Add(cidr < 32 ? $"{ip}/{cidr}" : $"{ip}");
                    }
                    break;

                case 0x0015:
                    for (int i = 0; i < count && pos + 20 <= data.Length; i++, pos += 20)
                    {
                        var ip = new IPAddress(data.AsSpan(pos, 16));
                        int pfx = data[pos + 16];
                        ips.Add(pfx < 128 ? $"{ip}/{pfx}" : $"{ip}");
                    }
                    break;
            }

            return ips;
        }
        catch { return []; }
    }

    // ── Layer direction mapping ─────────────────────────────────

    public static string GetLayerDirection(string layerName) => layerName.ToUpperInvariant() switch
    {
        var n when n.StartsWith("ALE_AUTH_LISTEN_V") => "Inbound",
        var n when n.StartsWith("ALE_AUTH_RECV_ACCEPT_V") => "Inbound",
        var n when n.StartsWith("INBOUND_") => "Inbound",
        var n when n.StartsWith("ALE_AUTH_CONNECT_V") => "Outbound",
        var n when n.StartsWith("ALE_CONNECT_REDIRECT_V") => "Outbound",
        var n when n.StartsWith("OUTBOUND_") => "Outbound",
        var n when n.StartsWith("ALE_RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_V") => "Both",
        var n when n.StartsWith("ALE_RESOURCE_RELEASE_V") => "Both",
        var n when n.StartsWith("ALE_BIND_REDIRECT_V") => "Both",
        var n when n.StartsWith("ALE_FLOW_ESTABLISHED_V") => "Both",
        var n when n.StartsWith("ALE_ENDPOINT_CLOSURE_V") => "Both",
        var n when n.StartsWith("DATAGRAM_DATA_V") => "Both",
        var n when n.StartsWith("STREAM_V") => "Both",
        var n when n.StartsWith("STREAM_PACKET_V") => "Both",
        _ => "Unknown"
    };

    // ── Internal intermediate record ────────────────────────────

    private sealed record WfpArbitratedFilter(
        WfpEnrichedFilterDto Filter,
        int OrderId,
        string Conditions,
        string ProviderDataBufferParsed,
        bool IsIgnored,
        string IgnoredReason)
    {
        public ulong FilterId => Filter.FilterId;
        public string Name => Filter.Name;
        public string LayerName => Filter.LayerName;
        public ushort LayerOrder => Filter.LayerOrder;
        public string SubLayerName => Filter.SubLayerName;
        public ushort SubLayerWeight => Filter.SubLayerWeight;
        public ulong EffectiveWeightNumeric => Filter.EffectiveWeightNumeric;
        public int ConditionsCount => Filter.ConditionsCount;
        public string ConditionsJson => Filter.ConditionsJson;
        public string Action => Filter.Action;
        public string ProviderName => Filter.ProviderName;
        public string ProviderKey => Filter.ProviderKey;
        public string ProviderContextKey => Filter.ProviderContextKey;
        public string CalloutName => Filter.CalloutName;
        public string ProviderContextName => Filter.ProviderContextName;
        public bool IsBoottime => Filter.IsBoottime;
        public bool HasClearActionRight => Filter.HasClearActionRight;
    }
}

                                                                    -->
                                                                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"
                                                                                HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                                                                                ToolTip="{Binding Result}">
                                                                        <c:PackIcon x:Name="ExceptionIcon"
                                                                                    Icon="ExclamationTriangle"
                                                                                    IconSize="10"
                                                                                    PrimaryBrush="{StaticResource CheckMarkIconWarningColor}"
                                                                                    AccentBrush="{StaticResource CheckMarkIconWarningColor}"
                                                                                    Margin="0,0,5,0"/>

                                                                        <c:PackIcon x:Name="ResultIcon"
                                                                                Icon="X"
                                                                                IconSize="10"
                                                                                PrimaryBrush="{StaticResource WorkflowFailedIconColor}"/>
                                                                    </StackPanel>
                                                                    <DataTemplate.Triggers>
                                                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding Result}" Value="1">
                                                                            <Setter TargetName="ResultIcon" Property="c:PackIcon.Icon" Value="Check"/>
                                                                            <Setter TargetName="ResultIcon" Property="c:PackIcon.PrimaryBrush" Value="{StaticResource WorkflowValidIconColor}"/>
                                                                        </DataTrigger>
                                                                        <MultiDataTrigger>
                                                                            <MultiDataTrigger.Conditions>
                                                                                <Condition Binding="{Binding Errors}" Value="{x:Null}"/>
                                                                                <Condition Binding="{Binding ActionResult.Exception}" Value="{x:Null}"/>
                                                                            </MultiDataTrigger.Conditions>
                                                                            <Setter TargetName="ExceptionIcon" Property="Visibility" Value="Collapsed"/>
                                                                        </MultiDataTrigger>
                                                                    </DataTemplate.Triggers>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    </c:SmartDataGrid.Columns>

                                                    <c:SmartDataGrid.RowDetailsTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Grid Margin="5">
                                                                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                                                    <ColumnDefinition/>
                                                                    <ColumnDefinition/>
                                                                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                                                <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                                                    <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                                                                    <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                                                    <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                                                </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                                                                <StackPanel x:Name="ValuesJson" Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="0"
                                                                            Margin="0" TextBlock.Foreground="{StaticResource BS.Warning.Text.Emphasis}">
                                                                    <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Warning.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                            Background="{StaticResource BS.Warning.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                            BorderThickness="1"
                                                                            Padding="5,0"
                                                                            HorizontalAlignment="Left">
                                                                        <TextBlock Text="Result(s)" FontSize="7 pt"/>
                                                                    </Border>

                                                                    <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Warning.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                            Background="{StaticResource BS.Warning.Bg.Subtle}"
                                                                            BorderThickness="1"
                                                                            CornerRadius="0,5,5,5"
                                                                            Padding="5">
                                                                        <TextBox Text="{Binding Values, Converter={vc:JsonIndentConverter}}"
                                                                                 FontFamily="Cascade Mono"
                                                                                 TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                                                                 IsReadOnly="True"
                                                                                 BorderThickness="0"
                                                                                 Background="Transparent"
                                                                                 IsTabStop="False"/>
                                                                    </Border>
                                                                </StackPanel>

                                                                <StackPanel x:Name="EnforcementSourcesJson" Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0"
                                                                            Margin="5,0,0,0" TextBlock.Foreground="#2b2250">
                                                                    <Border BorderBrush="#c5b3e6"
                                                                            Background="#c5b3e6"
                                                                            BorderThickness="1"
                                                                            Padding="5,0"
                                                                            HorizontalAlignment="Left">
                                                                        <TextBlock Text="Enforcements" FontSize="7 pt"/>
                                                                    </Border>

                                                                    <Border BorderBrush="#c5b3e6"
                                                                            Background="#e2d9f3"
                                                                            BorderThickness="1"
                                                                            CornerRadius="0,5,5,5"
                                                                            Padding="5">
                                                                        <TextBox Text="{Binding EnforcementSources, Converter={vc:JsonIndentConverter}}"
                                                                                 FontFamily="Cascade Mono"
                                                                                 TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                                                                 IsReadOnly="True"
                                                                                 BorderThickness="0"
                                                                                 Background="Transparent"
                                                                                 IsTabStop="False"/>
                                                                    </Border>
                                                                </StackPanel>

                                                                <!-- Remediation action output. Exposes the text produced by the
                                                                     action associated with the rule (previously smuggled inside
                                                                     Result(s)). Dedicated pane makes the semantic distinction
                                                                     between rule evaluation values and action side-effects. -->
                                                                <StackPanel x:Name="ActionOutputPanel" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="1"
                                                                            Margin="0,5,0,0" TextBlock.Foreground="{StaticResource BS.Info.Text.Emphasis}">
                                                                    <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Info.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                            Background="{StaticResource BS.Info.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                            BorderThickness="1"
                                                                            Padding="5,0"
                                                                            HorizontalAlignment="Left">
                                                                        <TextBlock Text="Action output" FontSize="7 pt"/>
                                                                    </Border>

                                                                    <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Info.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                            Background="{StaticResource BS.Info.Bg.Subtle}"
                                                                            BorderThickness="1"
                                                                            CornerRadius="0,5,5,5"
                                                                            Padding="5">
                                                                        <TextBox Text="{Binding ActionResult.Output}"
                                                                                 FontFamily="Cascade Mono"
                                                                                 TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                                                                 IsReadOnly="True"
                                                                                 BorderThickness="0"
                                                                                 Background="Transparent"
                                                                                 IsTabStop="False"/>
                                                                    </Border>
                                                                </StackPanel>

                                                                <StackPanel x:Name="ExpressionString" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="2"
                                                                            Margin="0,5,0,0" TextBlock.Foreground="{StaticResource BS.Success.Text.Emphasis}">
                                                                    <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Success.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                            Background="{StaticResource BS.Success.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                            BorderThickness="1"
                                                                            Padding="5,0"
                                                                            HorizontalAlignment="Left">
                                                                        <TextBlock Text="Rule" FontSize="7 pt"/>
                                                                    </Border>

                                                                    <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Success.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                            Background="{StaticResource BS.Success.Bg.Subtle}"
                                                                            BorderThickness="1"
                                                                            CornerRadius="0,5,5,5"
                                                                            Padding="5">
                                                                        <TextBox Text="{Binding Expression}"
                                                                                 FontFamily="Cascade Mono"
                                                                                 TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                                                                 IsReadOnly="True"
                                                                                 BorderThickness="0"
                                                                                 Background="Transparent"
                                                                                 IsTabStop="False"/>
                                                                    </Border>
                                                                </StackPanel>

                                                                <!-- Consolidated exceptions panel.
                                                                     - Rule exception block: exception raised while evaluating the rule.
                                                                     - Action exception block: exception raised by the remediation action.
                                                                     Each block collapses independently; the parent panel collapses
                                                                     only when BOTH are absent (MultiDataTrigger below). -->
                                                                <StackPanel x:Name="ErrorsPanel" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="2"
                                                                            Margin="0,5,0,0" TextBlock.Foreground="{StaticResource BS.Danger.Text.Emphasis}">
                                                                    <StackPanel x:Name="RuleExceptionBlock">
                                                                        <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Danger.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                                Background="{StaticResource BS.Danger.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                                BorderThickness="1"
                                                                                Padding="5,0"
                                                                                HorizontalAlignment="Left">
                                                                            <TextBlock Text="Rule exception" FontSize="7 pt"/>
                                                                        </Border>

                                                                        <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Danger.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                                Background="{StaticResource BS.Danger.Bg.Subtle}"
                                                                                BorderThickness="1"
                                                                                CornerRadius="0,5,5,5"
                                                                                Padding="5">
                                                                            <TextBox Text="{Binding Errors, Converter={vc:JsonIndentConverter}}"
                                                                                     FontFamily="Cascade Mono"
                                                                                     TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                                                                     IsReadOnly="True"
                                                                                     BorderThickness="0"
                                                                                     Background="Transparent"
                                                                                     IsTabStop="False"/>
                                                                        </Border>
                                                                    </StackPanel>

                                                                    <StackPanel x:Name="ActionExceptionBlock" Margin="0,5,0,0">
                                                                        <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Danger.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                                Background="{StaticResource BS.Danger.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                                BorderThickness="1"
                                                                                Padding="5,0"
                                                                                HorizontalAlignment="Left">
                                                                            <TextBlock Text="Action exception" FontSize="7 pt"/>
                                                                        </Border>

                                                                        <Border BorderBrush="{StaticResource BS.Danger.Border.Subtle}"
                                                                                Background="{StaticResource BS.Danger.Bg.Subtle}"
                                                                                BorderThickness="1"
                                                                                CornerRadius="0,5,5,5"
                                                                                Padding="5">
                                                                            <TextBox Text="{Binding ActionResult.Exception, Converter={vc:JsonIndentConverter}}"
                                                                                     FontFamily="Cascade Mono"
                                                                                     TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                                                                     IsReadOnly="True"
                                                                                     BorderThickness="0"
                                                                                     Background="Transparent"
                                                                                     IsTabStop="False"/>
                                                                        </Border>
                                                                    </StackPanel>
                                                                </StackPanel>
                                                            </Grid>
                                                            <DataTemplate.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding EnforcementSources}" Value="{x:Null}">
                                                                    <Setter TargetName="EnforcementSourcesJson" Property="Visibility" Value="Collapsed"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding ActionResult.Output}" Value="{x:Null}">
                                                                    <Setter TargetName="ActionOutputPanel" Property="Visibility" Value="Collapsed"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding Errors}" Value="{x:Null}">
                                                                    <Setter TargetName="RuleExceptionBlock" Property="Visibility" Value="Collapsed"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding ActionResult.Exception}" Value="{x:Null}">
                                                                    <Setter TargetName="ActionExceptionBlock" Property="Visibility" Value="Collapsed"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                <MultiDataTrigger>
                                                                    <MultiDataTrigger.Conditions>
                                                                        <Condition Binding="{Binding Errors}" Value="{x:Null}"/>
                                                                        <Condition Binding="{Binding ActionResult.Exception}" Value="{x:Null}"/>
                                                                    </MultiDataTrigger.Conditions>
                                                                    <Setter TargetName="ErrorsPanel" Property="Visibility" Value="Collapsed"/>
                                                                </MultiDataTrigger>
                                                            </DataTemplate.Triggers>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </c:SmartDataGrid.RowDetailsTemplate>
                                                </c:SmartDataGrid>
                                            </DataTemplate>

                                            <!-- Custom DataTemplate for the WFP SubLayer Details Table.
                                                 Outer ItemsSource binds to the POCO IReadOnlyList<WfpSubLayerRow>;
                                                 the row-details DataTemplate drills into each row's
                                                 FilterDetails : IReadOnlyList<WfpSubLayerFilterRow>. -->
                                            <DataTemplate x:Key="WfpSubLayerDetails">
                                                <c:SmartDataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding}"
                                                                 MaxHeight="800"
                                                                 AutoGenerateColumns="True"
                                                                 RowDetailsVisibilityMode="VisibleWhenSelected">
                                                    <c:SmartDataGrid.RowDetailsTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <c:SmartDataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding FilterDetails}"
                                                                             MaxHeight="500"
                                                                             AutoGenerateColumns="True"
                                                                             IsReadOnly="True"
                                                                             Margin="20,5,5,5"
                                                                             Width="{Binding ActualWidth,
                                                                                            RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=c:SmartDataGrid}}"/>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </c:SmartDataGrid.RowDetailsTemplate>
                                                </c:SmartDataGrid>
                                            </DataTemplate>

                                            <!-- Custom DataTemplate for the WFP Firewall View Table.
                                                 Outer ItemsSource binds to the POCO IReadOnlyList<WfpFirewallRow>;
                                                 the row-details DataTemplate drills into each row's
                                                 VariantDetails : IReadOnlyList<WfpFirewallVariantRow>. -->
                                            <DataTemplate x:Key="WfpFirewallView">
                                                <c:SmartDataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding}"
                                                                 MaxHeight="800"
                                                                 AutoGenerateColumns="True"
                                                                 RowDetailsVisibilityMode="VisibleWhenSelected">
                                                    <c:SmartDataGrid.RowDetailsTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <c:SmartDataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding VariantDetails}"
                                                                             MaxHeight="500"
                                                                             AutoGenerateColumns="True"
                                                                             IsReadOnly="True"
                                                                             Margin="20,5,5,5"
                                                                             Width="{Binding ActualWidth,
                                                                                            RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=c:SmartDataGrid}}"/>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </c:SmartDataGrid.RowDetailsTemplate>
                                                </c:SmartDataGrid>
                                            </DataTemplate>
                                        </Grid.Resources>

                                        <ContentPresenter Content="{Binding Content}"
                                                          ContentTemplateSelector="{s:AncestorTemplateSelector Default={StaticResource DefaultItemPanelTemplate}}"/>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Border>
                            </Border>

                            <!-- Children -->
                            <ItemsPresenter x:Name="ItemsHost"
                                            Grid.Column="0"
                                            Grid.ColumnSpan="5"
                                            Grid.Row="3"
                                            HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                                            ClipToBounds="True"
                                            SnapsToDevicePixels="True"
                                            Visibility="Collapsed"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                        <Trigger Property="IsExpanded" Value="true">
                            <Setter TargetName="ItemsHost" Property="Visibility" Value="Visible" />
                        </Trigger>
                        <Trigger Property="HasItems" Value="false">
                            <Setter TargetName="ItemArrowToggle" Property="Visibility" Value="Hidden" />
                        </Trigger>
                        <Trigger Property="HasItems" Value="true">
                            <Setter TargetName="ItemArrowToggle" Property="Visibility" Value="Visible" />
                            <Setter TargetName="ItemHeaderPanel" Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
                        </Trigger>
                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding Content, Converter={vc:IsNullConverter}}" Value="False">
                            <Setter TargetName="ItemArrowToggle" Property="Visibility" Value="Visible" />
                            <Setter TargetName="ItemHeaderPanel" Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
                        </DataTrigger>
                        <MultiDataTrigger>
                            <MultiDataTrigger.Conditions>
                                <Condition Binding="{Binding IsExpanded, RelativeSource={RelativeSource Self}}" Value="True"/>
                                <Condition Binding="{Binding Content, Converter={vc:IsNullConverter}}" Value="False"/>
                            </MultiDataTrigger.Conditions>
                            <Setter TargetName="ItemPanel" Property="Visibility" Value="Visible"/>
                        </MultiDataTrigger>
                    </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                </ControlTemplate>
            </Setter.Value>
        </Setter>
    </Style>

    <Style x:Key="CategoryTreeViewItemStyle" TargetType="TreeViewItem">
        <Setter Property="Focusable" Value="False"/>
        <Setter Property="Template">
            <Setter.Value>
                <ControlTemplate TargetType="{x:Type TreeViewItem}">
                    <StackPanel Background="{StaticResource CategoryBackgroundColor}">
                        <TextBlock Foreground="{StaticResource CategoryForegroundColor}"
                                   Text="{Binding Label}"
                                   FontWeight="Bold"
                                   FontSize="10 pt"
                                   Padding="3"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ControlTemplate>
            </Setter.Value>
        </Setter>
    </Style>

        <Setter Property="Template">
            <Setter.Value>
                <ControlTemplate TargetType="TreeView">
                    <ItemsPresenter />
                </ControlTemplate>
            </Setter.Value>
        </Setter>

                <ItemsPanelTemplate>
