using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.Enums;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.Exceptions;
using ComplianceService;
using ComplianceService.Data;
using ComplianceService.Interfaces;
using Components.Interfaces;
using Components.Windows.BitLocker;
using Components.Windows.EventLog;
using Components.Windows.Registry;
using Components.Windows.Win32Api;
using Components.Windows.Wmi;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using Microsoft.Management.Infrastructure;
using Moq;

namespace ComplianceService.Tests.Data.Firewall;

/// <summary>
/// Tests for the <c>Firewall</c> partial of <see cref="DataService"/> covering
/// <see cref="DataService.GetNetFirewallProfileState(string)"/>,
/// <see cref="DataService.GetNetConnectionProfileName"/>,
/// and the SecurityCenter wrappers
/// <see cref="DataService.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct"/> /
/// <see cref="DataService.GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct"/>.
///
/// COM-bound methods (<c>GetNetFwProducts</c>, <c>GetWfpEnrichedState</c>) are
/// intentionally NOT covered: they instantiate native COM types directly
/// (<c>HNetCfg.FwProducts</c>, <c>WfpService</c>) without going through any
/// injected interface and would require a real Windows host to exercise.
/// </summary>
[TestClass]
public class FirewallTests
{
    private const string FW_PROFILE_CLASS  = "MSFT_NetFirewallProfile";
    private const string CONN_PROFILE_CLASS = "MSFT_NetConnectionProfile";
    private const string STANDARD_CIM_NS    = @"root/StandardCimv2";
    private const string SECURITY_CENTER_NS = @"root\SecurityCenter2";
    private const string SENTINEL_DISPLAY_NAME = "Sentinel Firewall";
    private const string SEP_DISPLAY_NAME      = "Symantec Endpoint Protection";

    private Mock<ICim> _cim = null!;
    private DataService _sut = null!;

    [TestInitialize]
    public void Setup()
    {
        _cim = new Mock<ICim>();
        ResetStaticCaches();
        _sut = CreateDataService();
    }

    // ─── GetNetFirewallProfileState ──────────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    [DataRow("")]
    [DataRow(null)]
    public async Task GetNetFirewallProfileState_NullOrEmptyName_ReturnsNull(string? profileName)
    {
        var state = await _sut.GetNetFirewallProfileState(profileName!);

        Assert.IsNull(state,
            "Empty profile name short-circuits before hitting CIM.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFirewallProfileState_EnabledOne_ReturnsOn()
    {
        var profile = MakeFirewallProfileInstance(enabled: 1);
        SetupGetInstance(FW_PROFILE_CLASS, $"Name = 'Domain'", STANDARD_CIM_NS, profile);

        var state = await _sut.GetNetFirewallProfileState("Domain");

        Assert.AreEqual(FirewallState.On, state);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFirewallProfileState_EnabledZero_ReturnsOff()
    {
        var profile = MakeFirewallProfileInstance(enabled: 0);
        SetupGetInstance(FW_PROFILE_CLASS, $"Name = 'Public'", STANDARD_CIM_NS, profile);

        var state = await _sut.GetNetFirewallProfileState("Public");

        Assert.AreEqual(FirewallState.Off, state);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFirewallProfileState_EnabledUnknownValue_ReturnsUnknown()
    {
        var profile = MakeFirewallProfileInstance(enabled: 99);
        SetupGetInstance(FW_PROFILE_CLASS, $"Name = 'Private'", STANDARD_CIM_NS, profile);

        var state = await _sut.GetNetFirewallProfileState("Private");

        Assert.AreEqual(FirewallState.Unknown, state,
            "Any value outside {0,1} maps to Unknown.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFirewallProfileState_NoProfileInstance_ReturnsUnknown()
    {
        SetupGetInstance(FW_PROFILE_CLASS, $"Name = 'Domain'", STANDARD_CIM_NS, null);

        var state = await _sut.GetNetFirewallProfileState("Domain");

        Assert.AreEqual(FirewallState.Unknown, state,
            "No instance ⇒ state is null after the cast ⇒ switch falls through to Unknown.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFirewallProfileState_CimThrows_WrapsInServiceException()
    {
        _cim.Setup(c => c.GetInstance(FW_PROFILE_CLASS, It.IsAny<string>(), null, STANDARD_CIM_NS, null))
            .Throws(new CimException("WMI offline"));

        var ex = await Assert.ThrowsExactlyAsync<ServiceException>(() => _sut.GetNetFirewallProfileState("Domain"));
        Assert.IsInstanceOfType<CimException>(ex.InnerException);
    }

    // ─── GetNetConnectionProfileName ─────────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetConnectionProfileName_NoActiveProfile_ReturnsPublic()
    {
        // ── BY DESIGN ──
        // Windows NLA does not expose a NetConnectionProfile when the host has
        // no active classified adapter. The Windows Firewall still arms the
        // *Public* profile as the conservative default. Compliance rules that
        // evaluate against the "active" profile must therefore read this as
        // "Public" — not null. See Firewall.cs XML doc on this method.
        SetupGetInstance(CONN_PROFILE_CLASS, null, STANDARD_CIM_NS, null);

        var name = await _sut.GetNetConnectionProfileName();

        Assert.AreEqual("Public", name);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetConnectionProfileName_NetworkCategoryDomain_ReturnsDomain()
    {
        var profile = MakeConnectionProfileInstance(networkCategory: 2u);
        SetupGetInstance(CONN_PROFILE_CLASS, null, STANDARD_CIM_NS, profile);

        var name = await _sut.GetNetConnectionProfileName();

        Assert.AreEqual("Domain", name);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetConnectionProfileName_NetworkCategoryPrivate_ReturnsPrivate()
    {
        var profile = MakeConnectionProfileInstance(networkCategory: 1u);
        SetupGetInstance(CONN_PROFILE_CLASS, null, STANDARD_CIM_NS, profile);

        var name = await _sut.GetNetConnectionProfileName();

        Assert.AreEqual("Private", name);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetConnectionProfileName_NetworkCategoryPublic_ReturnsPublic()
    {
        var profile = MakeConnectionProfileInstance(networkCategory: 0u);
        SetupGetInstance(CONN_PROFILE_CLASS, null, STANDARD_CIM_NS, profile);

        var name = await _sut.GetNetConnectionProfileName();

        Assert.AreEqual("Public", name);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetConnectionProfileName_NetworkCategoryUnmapped_ReturnsUnknownLabel()
    {
        var profile = MakeConnectionProfileInstance(networkCategory: 99u);
        SetupGetInstance(CONN_PROFILE_CLASS, null, STANDARD_CIM_NS, profile);

        var name = await _sut.GetNetConnectionProfileName();

        Assert.AreEqual("Unknown (99)", name,
            "Categories outside {0,1,2} are surfaced verbatim for diagnostics.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetConnectionProfileName_CimThrows_WrapsInServiceException()
    {
        _cim.Setup(c => c.GetInstance(CONN_PROFILE_CLASS, null, null, STANDARD_CIM_NS, null))
            .Throws(new CimException("WMI offline"));

        var ex = await Assert.ThrowsExactlyAsync<ServiceException>(_sut.GetNetConnectionProfileName);
        Assert.IsInstanceOfType<CimException>(ex.InnerException);
    }

    // ─── SecurityCenter Firewall Product wrappers ────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct_NoCimInstance_ReturnsNull()
    {
        SetupGetInstancesEmpty(
            classNameOrQuery: "FirewallProduct",
            filter: $"DisplayName = '{SENTINEL_DISPLAY_NAME}'",
            nameSpace: SECURITY_CENTER_NS);

        var product = await _sut.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct();

        Assert.IsNull(product, "No matching FirewallProduct instance ⇒ null.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct_NoCimInstance_ReturnsNull()
    {
        SetupGetInstancesEmpty(
            classNameOrQuery: "FirewallProduct",
            filter: $"DisplayName = '{SEP_DISPLAY_NAME}'",
            nameSpace: SECURITY_CENTER_NS);

        var product = await _sut.GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct();

        Assert.IsNull(product);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void GetSecurityCenterFirewallProduct_NoCimInstance_ReturnsNull()
    {
        // The internal helper is sync; calling it directly avoids the wrapper
        // overhead but exercises the same null-fallback path.
        SetupGetInstancesEmpty(
            classNameOrQuery: "FirewallProduct",
            filter: $"DisplayName = 'Anything'",
            nameSpace: SECURITY_CENTER_NS);

        var product = _sut.GetSecurityCenterFirewallProduct("Anything");

        Assert.IsNull(product);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void GetSecurityCenterFirewallProduct_CimThrows_WrapsInServiceException()
    {
        _cim.Setup(c => c.GetInstances("FirewallProduct", It.IsAny<string>(), null, SECURITY_CENTER_NS, null))
            .Throws(new CimException("WMI offline"));

        var ex = Assert.ThrowsExactly<ServiceException>(() => _sut.GetSecurityCenterFirewallProduct("Anything"));
        Assert.IsInstanceOfType<CimException>(ex.InnerException);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct_CimThrows_WrapsInServiceException()
    {
        _cim.Setup(c => c.GetInstances("FirewallProduct", $"DisplayName = '{SENTINEL_DISPLAY_NAME}'", null, SECURITY_CENTER_NS, null))
            .Throws(new CimException("WMI offline"));

        var ex = await Assert.ThrowsExactlyAsync<ServiceException>(_sut.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct);
        Assert.IsInstanceOfType<CimException>(ex.InnerException);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct_CimThrows_WrapsInServiceException()
    {
        _cim.Setup(c => c.GetInstances("FirewallProduct", $"DisplayName = '{SEP_DISPLAY_NAME}'", null, SECURITY_CENTER_NS, null))
            .Throws(new CimException("WMI offline"));

        var ex = await Assert.ThrowsExactlyAsync<ServiceException>(_sut.GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct);
        Assert.IsInstanceOfType<CimException>(ex.InnerException);
    }

    // ─── Plumbing ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void SetupGetInstance(string className, string? filter, string nameSpace, CimInstance? toReturn)
    {
        _cim.Setup(c => c.GetInstance(className, filter, null, nameSpace, null))
            .Returns(toReturn);
    }

    private void SetupGetInstancesEmpty(string classNameOrQuery, string filter, string nameSpace)
    {
        _cim.Setup(c => c.GetInstances(classNameOrQuery, filter, null, nameSpace, null))
            .Returns(new List<CimInstance>());
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Builds a minimal <see cref="CimInstance"/> for <c>MSFT_NetFirewallProfile</c>
    /// carrying only the <c>Enabled</c> property the production code reads.
    /// </summary>
    private static CimInstance MakeFirewallProfileInstance(ushort enabled)
    {
        var ci = new CimInstance(FW_PROFILE_CLASS);
        ci.CimInstanceProperties.Add(CimProperty.Create("Enabled", enabled, CimFlags.None));
        return ci;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Builds a minimal <see cref="CimInstance"/> for <c>MSFT_NetConnectionProfile</c>
    /// carrying only the <c>NetworkCategory</c> property.
    /// </summary>
    private static CimInstance MakeConnectionProfileInstance(uint networkCategory)
    {
        var ci = new CimInstance(CONN_PROFILE_CLASS);
        ci.CimInstanceProperties.Add(CimProperty.Create("NetworkCategory", networkCategory, CimFlags.None));
        return ci;
    }

    private static void ResetStaticCaches()
    {
        const BindingFlags FLAGS = BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Static;
        foreach (var fieldName in new[]
        {
            "_cachedLastMdmSyncStatus",
            "_cachedSentinelOneAgentStatus",
            "_cachedWin32_ComputerSystem",
            "_cachedWin32_OperatingSystem",
            "_cachedWindowsDefenderStatus",
        })
        {
            typeof(DataService).GetField(fieldName, FLAGS)?.SetValue(null, null);
        }
    }

    private DataService CreateDataService() =>
        new(Mock.Of<ILogger<DataService>>(),
            Mock.Of<IBCrypt>(),
            Mock.Of<IBitLocker>(),
            Mock.Of<IEventLog>(),
            Mock.Of<IHttpClientFactory>(),
            new MemoryCache(new MemoryCacheOptions()),
            Mock.Of<INetworkInfo>(),
            Mock.Of<IRegistry>(),
            Mock.Of<ISerializer>(),
            Mock.Of<ITerminalSession>(),
            Mock.Of<IWindowsSetup>(),
            Mock.Of<IWinAPI>(),
            _cim.Object,
            Options.Create(new ServiceSettings()));
}


================================================================================
FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\ComplianceApp\ComplianceService.Tests\Grpc\FirewallGrpcServiceTests.cs
================================================================================
using System;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.Contracts;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.DTOs;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.Enums;
using ComplianceService.Grpc;
using Moq;
using Proto = Compliance.V1;

namespace ComplianceService.Tests.Grpc;

/// <summary>
/// Tests for the <c>Firewall</c> partial of <see cref="ComplianceGrpcService"/>.
///
/// <para>Notable contract quirks exercised here:</para>
/// <list type="bullet">
///   <item><see cref="FirewallState"/> uses <c>Unknown = 2</c> on the shared
///   side but the proto schema uses <c>255</c>. The handler does a raw
///   <c>(int)v.Value</c> cast — so the *numeric* wire value diverges. Test
///   pins down the current behaviour to highlight the protocol drift.</item>
///   <item><see cref="SecurityCenterProduct"/> projection serializes
///   <c>ProductStatus</c>/<c>SignatureStatus</c>/<c>ProductOwner</c> as raw
///   <c>uint.ToString()</c> strings (legacy on-wire convention).</item>
///   <item><see cref="Compliance.V1.WfpEnrichedNetEvent"/> guards
///   nullable scalar fields (<c>FilterId</c>, <c>LayerId</c>) and the
///   nested <c>Filter</c> message with a presence check.</item>
/// </list>
/// </summary>
[TestClass]
public class FirewallGrpcServiceTests
{
    private Mock<IDataService>   _svc  = null!;
    private Mock<IDefinitions>   _defs = null!;
    private ComplianceGrpcService _sut = null!;

    [TestInitialize]
    public void Setup()
    {
        _svc  = new Mock<IDataService>();
        _defs = new Mock<IDefinitions>();
        _sut  = new ComplianceGrpcService(_svc.Object, _defs.Object);
    }

    private static SecurityCenterProduct BuildScp() => SecurityCenterProduct.Create(
        name: "Defender",
        pathToSignedProductExe: @"C:\Defender.exe",
        productState: 0x60100u,
        productStatus: 0x10u,
        signatureStatus: 0u,
        productOwner: 1u);

    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------
    // Security center products (shared mapper)
    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct_PopulatedDto_ProjectsAllFields()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct()).ReturnsAsync(BuildScp());

        var r = await _sut.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct(
            new Proto.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProductRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.IsNotNull(r.Product);
        Assert.AreEqual("Defender", r.Product.Name);
        Assert.AreEqual(@"C:\Defender.exe", r.Product.PathToSignedProductExe);
        Assert.AreEqual(0x60100u, r.Product.ProductState);
        Assert.AreEqual("16", r.Product.ProductStatus);
        Assert.AreEqual("0",  r.Product.SignatureStatus);
        Assert.AreEqual("1",  r.Product.ProductOwner);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct_Null_ReturnsEmptyResponse()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct()).ReturnsAsync((SecurityCenterProduct?)null);

        var r = await _sut.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct(
            new Proto.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProductRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.IsNull(r.Product);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct_PopulatedDto_FlowsThrough()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct()).ReturnsAsync(BuildScp());

        var r = await _sut.GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct(
            new Proto.GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProductRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.IsNotNull(r.Product);
        Assert.AreEqual("Defender", r.Product.Name);
    }

    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------
    // GetNetFwProducts
    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFwProducts_PopulatedList_ProjectsAllRowsAndCategories()
    {
        var products = new[]
        {
            NetFwProduct.Create("FwA", @"C:\fwa.exe", [1u, 2u, 3u]),
            NetFwProduct.Create("FwB", @"C:\fwb.exe", [4u]),
        };
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetNetFwProducts()).ReturnsAsync(products);

        var r = await _sut.GetNetFwProducts(
            new Proto.GetNetFwProductsRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.AreEqual(2, r.Products.Count);
        Assert.AreEqual("FwA", r.Products[0].Name);
        CollectionAssert.AreEqual(new uint[] { 1, 2, 3 }, r.Products[0].RuleCategories);
        Assert.AreEqual("FwB", r.Products[1].Name);
        CollectionAssert.AreEqual(new uint[] { 4 }, r.Products[1].RuleCategories);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFwProducts_NullList_ReturnsEmptyRepeated()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetNetFwProducts()).ReturnsAsync((NetFwProduct[]?)null!);

        var r = await _sut.GetNetFwProducts(
            new Proto.GetNetFwProductsRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.AreEqual(0, r.Products.Count);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFwProducts_EmptyList_ReturnsEmptyRepeated()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetNetFwProducts()).ReturnsAsync(Array.Empty<NetFwProduct>());

        var r = await _sut.GetNetFwProducts(
            new Proto.GetNetFwProductsRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.AreEqual(0, r.Products.Count);
    }

    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------
    // GetNetConnectionProfileName
    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetConnectionProfileName_Populated_FlowsThrough()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetNetConnectionProfileName()).ReturnsAsync("Domain");

        var r = await _sut.GetNetConnectionProfileName(
            new Proto.GetNetConnectionProfileNameRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.AreEqual("Domain", r.Name);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetConnectionProfileName_Null_LeavesUnset()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetNetConnectionProfileName()).ReturnsAsync((string?)null);

        var r = await _sut.GetNetConnectionProfileName(
            new Proto.GetNetConnectionProfileNameRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.IsFalse(r.HasName);
    }

    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------
    // GetNetFirewallProfileState (with profile name + enum value drift)
    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFirewallProfileState_ForwardsProfileName_AndProjectsEnum()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetNetFirewallProfileState("Public")).ReturnsAsync(FirewallState.On);

        var r = await _sut.GetNetFirewallProfileState(
            new Proto.GetNetFirewallProfileStateRequest { ProfileName = "Public" },
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.IsTrue(r.HasState);
        Assert.AreEqual(Proto.FirewallState.On, r.State);
        _svc.Verify(s => s.GetNetFirewallProfileState("Public"), Times.Once);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFirewallProfileState_NullValue_LeavesUnset()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetNetFirewallProfileState(It.IsAny<string>()))
            .ReturnsAsync((FirewallState?)null);

        var r = await _sut.GetNetFirewallProfileState(
            new Proto.GetNetFirewallProfileStateRequest { ProfileName = "Domain" },
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.IsFalse(r.HasState);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetNetFirewallProfileState_SharedUnknownIs2_ProtoUnknownIs255_Diverges()
    {
        // Documented contract drift: shared enum value 2 is mis-mapped on
        // the wire. Regression-pin the current behaviour so refactors can't
        // change the wire format silently — the proper fix is to align the
        // proto schema with the shared enum (or vice-versa).
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetNetFirewallProfileState(It.IsAny<string>()))
            .ReturnsAsync(FirewallState.Unknown);   // shared = 2

        var r = await _sut.GetNetFirewallProfileState(
            new Proto.GetNetFirewallProfileStateRequest { ProfileName = "Public" },
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.IsTrue(r.HasState);
        Assert.AreEqual((Proto.FirewallState)2, r.State, "Wire ships raw shared.Unknown=2.");
        Assert.AreNotEqual(Proto.FirewallState.Unknown, r.State, "Proto Unknown is 255 — wire is 2.");
    }

    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------
    // GetWfpEnrichedState
    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetWfpEnrichedState_FullSnapshot_ProjectsEverything()
    {
        var filter = new WfpEnrichedFilterDto(
            FilterKey: "{f1}", FilterId: 42UL, Name: "F1",
            FlagsValue: "0x1", Flags: "Persistent",
            EffectiveWeightNumeric: 100UL, EffectiveWeight: "100",
            ConditionsCount: 1, ConditionsJson: "[]",
            Action: "Permit", IsBoottime: false, HasClearActionRight: true,
            LayerKey: "{l}", LayerName: "L1", LayerOrder: (ushort)1,
            SubLayerKey: "{sl}", SubLayerName: "SL1", SubLayerWeight: (ushort)2,
            ProviderKey: "{pk}", ProviderName: "P", ProviderDescription: "Desc",
            CalloutKey: "{ck}", CalloutName: "C",
            ProviderContextKey: "{pck}", ProviderContextName: "PCN",
            ProviderContextId: 7UL, ProviderContextType: 3u,
            ProviderContextTypeName: "Type3",
            ProviderContextDataHex: "AABB",
            ProviderContextDataBufferHex: "CCDD");

        var netEvent = new WfpEnrichedNetEventDto(
            Timestamp: "2026-01-15T10:00:00Z", EventType: "Block",
            IpVersion: 4u, IpProtocol: (byte)6, ProtocolName: "TCP",
            LocalAddress: "127.0.0.1", LocalPort: (ushort)443,
            RemoteAddress: "10.0.0.1", RemotePort: (ushort)80,
            AppId: "{app}", UserId: "{user}",
            FilterId: 42UL, LayerId: (ushort)1,
            LayerName: "L1",
            Flags: 0u, FlagsDecoded: "",
            Filter: filter);

        var dto = new WfpEnrichedStateDto(
            EngineOptions: [new WfpEngineOptionDto("Opt", 1u, "desc")],
            Filters: [filter],
            NetEvents: [netEvent]);

        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetWfpEnrichedState()).ReturnsAsync(dto);

        var r = await _sut.GetWfpEnrichedState(
            new Proto.GetWfpEnrichedStateRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.AreEqual(1, r.EngineOptions.Count);
        Assert.AreEqual("Opt", r.EngineOptions[0].Name);
        Assert.AreEqual(1u,   r.EngineOptions[0].Value);

        Assert.AreEqual(1, r.Filters.Count);
        Assert.AreEqual(42UL, r.Filters[0].FilterId);
        Assert.AreEqual("F1", r.Filters[0].Name);

        Assert.AreEqual(1, r.NetEvents.Count);
        var ev = r.NetEvents[0];
        Assert.AreEqual("Block", ev.EventType);
        Assert.IsTrue(ev.HasFilterId);
        Assert.AreEqual(42UL, ev.FilterId);
        Assert.IsTrue(ev.HasLayerId);
        Assert.AreEqual(1u, ev.LayerId);
        Assert.IsNotNull(ev.Filter);
        Assert.AreEqual(42UL, ev.Filter.FilterId);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetWfpEnrichedState_NetEventWithoutOptionalFields_LeavesPresenceFlagsFalse()
    {
        var netEvent = new WfpEnrichedNetEventDto(
            Timestamp: "ts", EventType: "Block",
            IpVersion: 4u, IpProtocol: (byte)6, ProtocolName: "TCP",
            LocalAddress: "lo", LocalPort: (ushort)0,
            RemoteAddress: "ra", RemotePort: (ushort)0,
            AppId: "a", UserId: "u",
            FilterId: null, LayerId: null,
            LayerName: "ln",
            Flags: 0u, FlagsDecoded: "",
            Filter: null);

        var dto = new WfpEnrichedStateDto(
            EngineOptions: [],
            Filters: [],
            NetEvents: [netEvent]);

        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetWfpEnrichedState()).ReturnsAsync(dto);

        var r = await _sut.GetWfpEnrichedState(
            new Proto.GetWfpEnrichedStateRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        var ev = r.NetEvents[0];
        Assert.IsFalse(ev.HasFilterId);
        Assert.IsFalse(ev.HasLayerId);
        Assert.IsNull(ev.Filter);
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public async Task GetWfpEnrichedState_EmptyState_ReturnsEmptyResponse()
    {
        _svc.Setup(s => s.GetWfpEnrichedState()).ReturnsAsync(
            new WfpEnrichedStateDto([], [], []));

        var r = await _sut.GetWfpEnrichedState(
            new Proto.GetWfpEnrichedStateRequest(),
            TestServerCallContext.Create());

        Assert.AreEqual(0, r.EngineOptions.Count);
        Assert.AreEqual(0, r.Filters.Count);
        Assert.AreEqual(0, r.NetEvents.Count);
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.Contracts;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.DTOs;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.Enums;
using ComplianceApp.Shared.Exceptions;
using Components.Windows.Win32Api;
using Components.Windows.Wmi;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Management.Infrastructure;

namespace ComplianceService.Data;

public partial class DataService : IFirewall
{
    public Task<SecurityCenterProduct?> GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct() =>
        Task.FromResult(GetSecurityCenterFirewallProduct("Sentinel Firewall"));

    public Task<SecurityCenterProduct?> GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct() =>
        Task.FromResult(GetSecurityCenterFirewallProduct("Symantec Endpoint Protection"));

    public async Task<NetFwProduct[]> GetNetFwProducts()
    {
        using var expirationToken = new CancellationTokenSource(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(5));
        return await Task.Run(async () =>
        {
            COMException? lastComException = null;

            // Workaround COMException updateServiceManager.Services not found
            while (!expirationToken.Token.IsCancellationRequested)
            {
                try
                {
                    var products = new List<NetFwProduct>();
                    const string progId = "HNetCfg.FwProducts";

                    // Charger le type COM à partir du ProgID
                    if (Type.GetTypeFromProgID(progId) is not Type comType)
                        throw new COMException($"COM Type '{progId}' did not exist");

                    if (Activator.CreateInstance(comType) is not { } fwproductsObj)
                        throw new COMException($"COM instance '{progId}' could not be created");

                    dynamic fwproducts = fwproductsObj;

                    for (var i = 0; i < fwproducts.Count; i++)
                    {
                        var fwProduct = fwproducts.Item(i);
                        var name = fwProduct.DisplayName ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("DisplayName cannot be null");
                        var pathToSignedProductExe = fwProduct.PathToSignedProductExe ?? string.Empty;
                        var ruleCategories = new List<uint>();

                        foreach (var category in fwProduct.RuleCategories)
                        {
                            string? categoryStr = category.ToString();
                            if (!uint.TryParse(categoryStr, out uint categoryValue))
                                continue;

                            ruleCategories.Add(categoryValue);
                        }

                        var fwproduct = NetFwProduct.Create(name, pathToSignedProductExe, (uint[])[.. ruleCategories]);
                        products.Add(fwproduct);
                    }

                    return products.ToArray();
                }
                catch (COMException ex)
                {
                    // Saving the last COMException
                    lastComException = ex;
                }

                await Task.Delay(100);
            }

            throw lastComException ?? new COMException();
        }, expirationToken.Token).ConfigureAwait(false);
    }

    public SecurityCenterProduct? GetSecurityCenterFirewallProduct(string displayName)
    {
        try
        {
            var ci = _cim.GetInstances(
                classNameOrQuery: "FirewallProduct",
                filter: $"DisplayName = '{displayName}'",
                nameSpace: @"root\SecurityCenter2")
                .FirstOrDefault();

            if (ci is null)
                return null;

            var avp = ci.ToCimClass<FirewallProduct2>();
            return SecurityCenterProduct.Create(
                avp.DisplayName,
                avp.PathToSignedProductExe,
                avp.ProductState,
                (uint)avp.ProductStatus,
                (uint)avp.SignatureStatus,
                (uint)avp.ProductOwner);
        }
        catch (NullReferenceException) { return null; }
        catch (Exception e)
        {
            _logger.LogError(e, "An exception occured while retrieving the SecurityCenter Firewall product '{DisplayName}'.", displayName);
            throw new ServiceException(e, $"An exception occured while retrieving the SecurityCenter Firewall product '{displayName}'.");
        }
    }

    public Task<FirewallState?> GetNetFirewallProfileState(string profilName)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(profilName))
            return Task.FromResult<FirewallState?>(null);

        try
        {
            var profile = _cim.GetInstance(
                classNameOrQuery: "MSFT_NetFirewallProfile",
                filter: $"Name = '{profilName}'",
                nameSpace: @"root/StandardCimv2");

            var state = (ushort?)profile?.CimInstanceProperties["Enabled"]?.Value;
            return Task.FromResult<FirewallState?>(state switch
            {
                1 => FirewallState.On,
                0 => FirewallState.Off,
                _ => FirewallState.Unknown
            });
        }
        catch (Exception e)
        {
            _logger.LogError(e, "An exception occured while retrieving the Firewall Profile State");
            throw new ServiceException(e, "An exception occured while retrieving the Firewall Profile State.");
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Returns the active Windows network connection profile name
    /// (<c>"Domain"</c>, <c>"Private"</c>, <c>"Public"</c> or
    /// <c>"Unknown (n)"</c> for unmapped values).
    /// </summary>
    /// <remarks>
    /// When no <c>MSFT_NetConnectionProfile</c> instance exists (no active
    /// network adapter is bound to a classified network), this method returns
    /// <c>"Public"</c> by design. Rationale:
    /// <list type="bullet">
    ///   <item>Windows NLA does not surface a <c>NetConnectionProfile</c>
    ///   instance for hosts that are completely offline.</item>
    ///   <item>The Windows Firewall still applies the <em>Public</em> profile
    ///   as the default conservative profile when an unclassified adapter
    ///   comes back up, until NLA classifies the new network.</item>
    ///   <item>Compliance rules that depend on the active profile (e.g. "the
    ///   firewall must be ON in Public") therefore evaluate against the
    ///   profile that *will* apply, not against an ambiguous null.</item>
    /// </list>
    /// Do not change this fall-through to <c>null</c> without first auditing
    /// the transformers that consume this RPC.
    /// </remarks>
    /// <summary>
    /// Returns the active Windows Network Connection Profile category as a
    /// string ("Domain" / "Private" / "Public" / "Unknown (...)").
    /// </summary>
    /// <remarks>
    /// <para>
    /// When the host has no active classified network adapter, NLA does not
    /// expose any <c>MSFT_NetConnectionProfile</c> instance. In that situation
    /// Windows itself defers to the <strong>Public</strong> profile of the
    /// firewall as a conservative default — this method intentionally mirrors
    /// that behavior and returns <c>"Public"</c> rather than <c>null</c> so
    /// downstream compliance rules that key off the active profile keep
    /// evaluating against the same set of rules Windows is actually applying.
    /// </para>
    /// <para>
    /// CIM failures (hive/provider issues) are wrapped in <see cref="ServiceException"/>
    /// rather than producing the "Public" fallback, since they don't match the
    /// "no network connected" semantic.
    /// </para>
    /// </remarks>
    public Task<string?> GetNetConnectionProfileName()
    {
        try
        {
            var profile = _cim.GetInstance(
                classNameOrQuery: "MSFT_NetConnectionProfile",
                nameSpace: @"root/StandardCimv2");

            // No active connection profile ⇒ host is offline / unclassified.
            // Windows itself arms the Public firewall profile in this case;
            // mirror that rather than returning null. See remarks above.
            if (profile == null)
                return Task.FromResult<string?>("Public");

            var networkCategory = (uint?)profile?.CimInstanceProperties["NetworkCategory"]?.Value;
            return Task.FromResult<string?>(networkCategory switch
            {
                2 => "Domain",
                1 => "Private",
                0 => "Public",
                _ => $"Unknown ({networkCategory})"
            });
        }
        catch (Exception e)
        {
            _logger.LogError(e, "An exception occured while retrieving the Firewall Connection Profile Name.");
            throw new ServiceException(e, "An exception occured while retrieving the Firewall Connection Profile Name.");
        }
    }

    public Task<WfpEnrichedStateDto> GetWfpEnrichedState()
    {
        try
        {
            using var wfp = new WfpService();
            if (!wfp.Connect())
                throw new ServiceException($"WFP connection error: {wfp.LastErrorName}");

            var enriched = wfp.GetEnrichedState();

            var engineOptions = enriched.EngineOptions
                .Select(o => new WfpEngineOptionDto(o.Name, o.Value, o.Description))
                .ToList();

            var filters = enriched.Filters
                .Select(MapEnrichedFilter)
                .ToList();

            var netEvents = enriched.NetEvents
                .Select(e => new WfpEnrichedNetEventDto(
                    e.Timestamp, e.EventType, (uint)e.IpVersion, e.IpProtocol,
                    e.ProtocolName, e.LocalAddress, e.LocalPort, e.RemoteAddress, e.RemotePort,
                    e.AppId, e.UserId, e.FilterId, e.LayerId, e.LayerName,
                    e.Flags, e.FlagsDecoded,
                    e.Filter is not null ? MapEnrichedFilter(e.Filter) : null))
                .ToList();

            return Task.FromResult(new WfpEnrichedStateDto(engineOptions, filters, netEvents));
        }
        catch (ServiceException)
        {
            throw;
        }
        catch (Exception e)
        {
            _logger.LogError(e, "An exception occurred while retrieving WFP enriched state.");
            throw new ServiceException(e, "An exception occurred while retrieving WFP enriched state.");
        }
    }

    private static WfpEnrichedFilterDto MapEnrichedFilter(Components.Windows.Win32Api.WfpEnrichedFilter f) => new(
        f.FilterKey, f.FilterId, f.Name, f.FlagsValue, f.Flags,
        f.EffectiveWeightNumeric, f.EffectiveWeight, f.ConditionsCount, f.ConditionsJson,
        f.Action, f.IsBoottime, f.HasClearActionRight,
        f.LayerKey, f.LayerName, f.LayerOrder,
        f.SubLayerKey, f.SubLayerName, f.SubLayerWeight,
        f.ProviderKey, f.ProviderName, f.ProviderDescription,
        f.CalloutKey, f.CalloutName,
        f.ProviderContextKey, f.ProviderContextName, f.ProviderContextId,
        f.ProviderContextType, f.ProviderContextTypeName,
        f.ProviderContextDataHex, f.ProviderContextDataBufferHex);
}

================================================================================
using Compliance.V1;
using Grpc.Core;

namespace ComplianceService.Grpc;

public partial class ComplianceGrpcService
{
    public override async Task<GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProductResponse> GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct(
        GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProductRequest request, ServerCallContext context)
    {
        var r = new GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProductResponse();
        var v = await _svc.GetSentinelOneSecurityCenterFirewallProduct().ConfigureAwait(false);
        if (v is not null) r.Product = MapSecurityCenterProduct(v);
        return r;
    }

    public override async Task<GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProductResponse> GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct(
        GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProductRequest request, ServerCallContext context)
    {
        var r = new GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProductResponse();
        var v = await _svc.GetSepSecurityCenterFirewallProduct().ConfigureAwait(false);
        if (v is not null) r.Product = MapSecurityCenterProduct(v);
        return r;
    }

    public override async Task<GetNetFwProductsResponse> GetNetFwProducts(
        GetNetFwProductsRequest request, ServerCallContext context)
    {
        var r = new GetNetFwProductsResponse();
        var v = await _svc.GetNetFwProducts().ConfigureAwait(false);
        if (v is not null)
        {
            foreach (var p in v)
            {
                var entry = new Compliance.V1.NetFwProduct
                {
                    Name = p.Name ?? "",
                    PathToSignedProductExe = p.PathToSignedProductExe ?? ""
                };
                if (p.RuleCategories is not null) entry.RuleCategories.AddRange(p.RuleCategories);
                r.Products.Add(entry);
            }
        }
        return r;
    }

    public override async Task<GetNetConnectionProfileNameResponse> GetNetConnectionProfileName(
        GetNetConnectionProfileNameRequest request, ServerCallContext context)
    {
        var r = new GetNetConnectionProfileNameResponse();
        var v = await _svc.GetNetConnectionProfileName().ConfigureAwait(false);
        if (v is not null) r.Name = v;
        return r;
    }

    public override async Task<GetNetFirewallProfileStateResponse> GetNetFirewallProfileState(
        GetNetFirewallProfileStateRequest request, ServerCallContext context)
    {
        var r = new GetNetFirewallProfileStateResponse();
        var v = await _svc.GetNetFirewallProfileState(request.ProfileName).ConfigureAwait(false);
        if (v.HasValue) r.State = (Compliance.V1.FirewallState)(int)v.Value;
        return r;
    }

    public override async Task<GetWfpEnrichedStateResponse> GetWfpEnrichedState(
        GetWfpEnrichedStateRequest request, ServerCallContext context)
    {
        var state = await _svc.GetWfpEnrichedState().ConfigureAwait(false);
        var r = new GetWfpEnrichedStateResponse();

        foreach (var o in state.EngineOptions)
            r.EngineOptions.Add(new Compliance.V1.WfpEngineOption
            {
                Name = o.Name ?? "", Value = o.Value, Description = o.Description ?? ""
            });

        foreach (var f in state.Filters)
            r.Filters.Add(MapProtoFilter(f));

        foreach (var e in state.NetEvents)
        {
            var entry = new Compliance.V1.WfpEnrichedNetEvent
            {
                Timestamp = e.Timestamp ?? "", EventType = e.EventType ?? "",
                IpVersion = e.IpVersion, IpProtocol = e.IpProtocol,
                ProtocolName = e.ProtocolName ?? "",
                LocalAddress = e.LocalAddress ?? "", LocalPort = e.LocalPort,
                RemoteAddress = e.RemoteAddress ?? "", RemotePort = e.RemotePort,
                AppId = e.AppId ?? "", UserId = e.UserId ?? "",
                LayerName = e.LayerName ?? "",
                Flags = e.Flags, FlagsDecoded = e.FlagsDecoded ?? ""
            };
            if (e.FilterId.HasValue) entry.FilterId = e.FilterId.Value;
            if (e.LayerId.HasValue) entry.LayerId = e.LayerId.Value;
            if (e.Filter is not null) entry.Filter = MapProtoFilter(e.Filter);
            r.NetEvents.Add(entry);
        }

        return r;
    }

    private static Compliance.V1.WfpEnrichedFilter MapProtoFilter(ComplianceApp.Shared.DTOs.WfpEnrichedFilterDto f) => new()
    {
        FilterKey = f.FilterKey ?? "", FilterId = f.FilterId, Name = f.Name ?? "",
        FlagsValue = f.FlagsValue ?? "", Flags = f.Flags ?? "",
        EffectiveWeightNumeric = f.EffectiveWeightNumeric, EffectiveWeight = f.EffectiveWeight ?? "",
        ConditionsCount = f.ConditionsCount, ConditionsJson = f.ConditionsJson ?? "",
        Action = f.Action ?? "", IsBoottime = f.IsBoottime, HasClearActionRight = f.HasClearActionRight,
        LayerKey = f.LayerKey ?? "", LayerName = f.LayerName ?? "", LayerOrder = f.LayerOrder,
        SubLayerKey = f.SubLayerKey ?? "", SubLayerName = f.SubLayerName ?? "", SubLayerWeight = f.SubLayerWeight,
        ProviderKey = f.ProviderKey ?? "", ProviderName = f.ProviderName ?? "", ProviderDescription = f.ProviderDescription ?? "",
        CalloutKey = f.CalloutKey ?? "", CalloutName = f.CalloutName ?? "",
        ProviderContextKey = f.ProviderContextKey ?? "", ProviderContextName = f.ProviderContextName ?? "",
        ProviderContextId = f.ProviderContextId, ProviderContextType = f.ProviderContextType,
        ProviderContextTypeName = f.ProviderContextTypeName ?? "",
        ProviderContextDataHex = f.ProviderContextDataHex ?? "",
        ProviderContextDataBufferHex = f.ProviderContextDataBufferHex ?? ""
    };

    private static Compliance.V1.SecurityCenterProduct MapSecurityCenterProduct(
        ComplianceApp.Shared.DTOs.SecurityCenterProduct p) => new()
    {
        Name = p.Name ?? "",
        PathToSignedProductExe = p.PathToSignedProductExe ?? "",
        ProductState = p.ProductState,
        ProductStatus = p.ProductStatus.ToString(),
        SignatureStatus = p.SignatureStatus.ToString(),
        ProductOwner = p.ProductOwner.ToString()
    };
}

FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\components\src\Components.Windows\DependencyInjection.cs

using Components.Windows.BitLocker;
using Components.Windows.EventLog;
using Components.Windows.Registry;
using Components.Windows.Win32Api;
using Components.Windows.Wmi;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace Components.Windows;

public static class DependencyInjectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Adds services related to Windows components to the specified IServiceCollection.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="services">The IServiceCollection to add services to.</param>
    /// <returns>The IServiceCollection so that additional calls can be chained.</returns>
    public static IServiceCollection AddWindowsComponents(this IServiceCollection services) =>
        services.AddScoped<IAuditPolicy, AuditPolicyService>()
                .AddScoped<IBCrypt, BCryptService>()
                .AddScoped<IBitLocker, BitLockerService>()
                .AddScoped<IEventLog, EventLogService>()
                .AddScoped<IIndirectString, IndirectStringService>()
                .AddScoped<ILocalSecurity, LocalSecurityService>()
                .AddScoped<IRegistry, RegistryService>()
                .AddScoped<ISecedit, SeceditService>()
                .AddScoped<ITerminalSession, TerminalSessionService>()
                .AddScoped<IWinAPI, WinAPI>()
                .AddScoped<IWfp, WfpService>()
                .AddScoped<ICim, CimService>()
#pragma warning disable CS0618 // Kept for backward compatibility during migration
                .AddScoped<IWmi, WmiService>();
#pragma warning restore CS0618
}

using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Components.Windows.Win32Api;

// from fwpmtypes.h FWPM_NET_EVENT_HEADER2 (Windows 8+)
// Size: 104 bytes on x64
/// <summary>
/// WFP net event header.
/// </summary>
[StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)]
internal struct FWPM_NET_EVENT_HEADER2
{
    public long timeStamp;                      // FILETIME (8 bytes)
    public uint flags;                          // FWPM_NET_EVENT_FLAG_xxx (4 bytes)
    public FWP_IP_VERSION ipVersion;            // (4 bytes)
    public byte ipProtocol;                     // IPPROTO (1 byte)
    private byte _pad1;
    private ushort _pad2;
    public FWP_IP_ADDRESS_UNION localAddr;      // union (16 bytes)
    public FWP_IP_ADDRESS_UNION remoteAddr;     // union (16 bytes)
    public ushort localPort;
    public ushort remotePort;
    public uint scopeId;
    private uint _padScopeId;
    public FWP_BYTE_BLOB appId;                 // FWP_BYTE_BLOB (16 bytes on x64)
    public nint userId;                         // SID*
    public uint addressFamily;                  // FWP_AF
    private uint _padAddressFamily;
    public nint packageSid;                     // SID*
}

// from fwpmtypes.h FWPM_NET_EVENT2 (Windows 8+)
/// <summary>
/// WFP net event.
/// </summary>
[StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)]
internal struct FWPM_NET_EVENT2
{
    public FWPM_NET_EVENT_HEADER2 header;
    public FWPM_NET_EVENT_TYPE type;
    private uint _padType;
    public nint eventData;
}

// from fwpmtypes.h FWPM_NET_EVENT_CLASSIFY_DROP0
/// <summary>
/// Minimal DROP structure (filterId + layerId).
/// </summary>
[StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)]
internal struct FWPM_NET_EVENT_CLASSIFY_DROP0
{
    public ulong filterId;
    public ushort layerId;
}

// from fwpmtypes.h FWPM_NET_EVENT_CLASSIFY_ALLOW0
/// <summary>
/// Minimal ALLOW structure. Same initial layout as DROP0.
/// </summary>
[StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)]
internal struct FWPM_NET_EVENT_CLASSIFY_ALLOW0
{
    public ulong filterId;
    public ushort layerId;
}

================================================================================
FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\components\src\Components.Windows\Win32Api\FWPTYPES\FWP_BYTE_ARRAY16.cs
================================================================================
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Components.Windows.Win32Api;

// from fwptypes.h FWP_BYTE_ARRAY16
/// <summary>
/// 16-byte array for IPv6 addresses.
/// Uses a fixed buffer compatible with FieldOffset unions.
/// </summary>
[StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential, Size = 16)]
internal unsafe struct FWP_BYTE_ARRAY16
{
    public fixed byte byteArray16[16];

    public byte[] ToArray()
    {
        byte[] result = new byte[16];
        fixed (byte* ptr = byteArray16)
        {
            for (int i = 0; i < 16; i++)
                result[i] = ptr[i];
        }
        return result;
    }
}

/// <summary>
/// Union for IPv4/IPv6 address.
/// Uses Explicit layout to map both types at the same offset.
/// </summary>

internal struct FWP_IP_ADDRESS_UNION
{
    [FieldOffset(0)]
    public uint ipv4;

    [FieldOffset(0)]
    public FWP_BYTE_ARRAY16 ipv6;

using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Components.Windows.Win32Api;

// from FWPUClnt.dll (Windows Filtering Platform user-mode API)
/// <summary>
/// P/Invoke declarations for WFP user-mode client.
/// </summary>
internal static class FwpUClnt
{
    private const string DllName = "FWPUClnt.dll";

    // Engine
    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmEngineOpen0(string? serverName, uint authnService, nint authIdentity, nint session, ref nint engineHandle);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmEngineClose0(nint engineHandle);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmEngineGetOption0(nint engineHandle, FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION option, out nint value);

    // Memory
    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern void FwpmFreeMemory0(ref nint p);

    // Providers
    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmProviderCreateEnumHandle0(nint engineHandle, nint enumTemplate, ref nint enumHandle);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmProviderEnum0(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle, uint numEntriesRequested, ref nint entries, out uint numEntriesReturned);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmProviderDestroyEnumHandle0(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle);

    // Filters
    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmFilterCreateEnumHandle0(nint engineHandle, nint enumTemplate, ref nint enumHandle);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmFilterEnum0(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle, uint numEntriesRequested, ref nint entries, out uint numEntriesReturned);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmFilterDestroyEnumHandle0(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle);

    // Sublayers
    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmSubLayerCreateEnumHandle0(nint engineHandle, nint enumTemplate, ref nint enumHandle);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmSubLayerEnum0(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle, uint numEntriesRequested, ref nint entries, out uint numEntriesReturned);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmSubLayerDestroyEnumHandle0(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle);

    // Layers
    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmLayerCreateEnumHandle0(nint engineHandle, nint enumTemplate, ref nint enumHandle);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmLayerEnum0(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle, uint numEntriesRequested, ref nint entries, out uint numEntriesReturned);

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmLayerDestroyEnumHandle0(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle);

    // Provider Contexts

    [DllImport(DllName)]
    internal static extern uint FwpmProviderContextEnum0(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle, uint numEntriesRequested, ref nint entries, out uint numEntriesReturned);

================================================================================
FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\components\src\Components.Windows\Win32Api\Wfp\IWfp.cs
================================================================================
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace Components.Windows.Win32Api;

public interface IWfp : IDisposable
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Opens a connection to the WFP engine.
    /// Must be called before any enumeration method.
    /// </summary>
    /// <returns>true if the connection succeeded; false otherwise.</returns>
    bool Connect();

    /// <summary>
    /// Last WFP error code from a failed operation.
    /// </summary>
    uint LastError { get; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Human-readable name for <see cref="LastError"/> (e.g. "ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED").
    /// Returns the hex code when the error is unknown.
    /// </summary>
    string LastErrorName { get; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Enumerates all WFP objects (layers, sublayers, providers, filters,
    /// provider contexts, callouts, net events) in a single snapshot.
    /// </summary>
    WfpState GetCompleteState();

    /// <summary>
    /// Queries all WFP engine options via FwpmEngineGetOption0.
    /// Must be called after <see cref="Connect"/>.
    /// </summary>
    List<WfpEngineOption> GetEngineOptions();

    /// <summary>
    /// Enriches filters by cross-referencing with layers, sublayers, providers,
    /// callouts, and provider contexts from the given <paramref name="state"/>.
    /// </summary>
    List<WfpEnrichedFilter> EnrichFilters(WfpState state);

    /// <summary>
    /// Enriches net events by correlating each event's FilterId with the
    /// corresponding <see cref="WfpEnrichedFilter"/> from <paramref name="enrichedFilters"/>.
    /// </summary>
    List<WfpEnrichedNetEvent> EnrichNetEvents(WfpState state, List<WfpEnrichedFilter> enrichedFilters);

    /// <summary>
    /// Returns a complete enriched snapshot: raw state, engine options,
    /// enriched filters, and enriched net events in a single call.
    /// </summary>
    WfpEnrichedState GetEnrichedState();
}

FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\components\src\Components.Windows\Win32Api\Wfp\WfpEnrichedFilter.cs

namespace Components.Windows.Win32Api;

/// <summary>
/// WfpFilter enriched with resolved names from Layer, SubLayer, Provider, Callout, and ProviderContext.
/// Each property is prefixed with its source object to avoid ambiguity.
/// </summary>
public record WfpEnrichedFilter(
    // ── Filter (core) ───────────────────────────────────────
    string FilterKey,
    ulong FilterId,
    string Name,
    string FlagsValue,
    string Flags,
    ulong EffectiveWeightNumeric,
    string EffectiveWeight,
    int ConditionsCount,
    string ConditionsJson,
    string Action,
    bool IsBoottime,
    bool HasClearActionRight,

    // ── Layer ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    string LayerKey,
    string LayerName,
    ushort LayerOrder,

    // ── SubLayer ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    string SubLayerKey,
    string SubLayerName,
    ushort SubLayerWeight,

    // ── Provider ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    string ProviderKey,
    string ProviderName,
    string ProviderDescription,

    // ── Callout ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    string CalloutKey,
    string CalloutName,

    // ── ProviderContext ───────────────────────────────────────
    string ProviderContextKey,
    string ProviderContextName,
    ulong ProviderContextId,
    uint ProviderContextType,
    string ProviderContextTypeName,
    string ProviderContextDataHex,
    string ProviderContextDataBufferHex
);


================================================================================
FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\components\src\Components.Windows\Win32Api\Wfp\WfpEnrichedNetEvent.cs
================================================================================
namespace Components.Windows.Win32Api;

/// <summary>
/// WfpNetEvent enriched with the full correlated <see cref="WfpEnrichedFilter"/>
/// (null when no FilterId match exists, e.g. for IKEEXT/IPSEC events).
/// </summary>
public record WfpEnrichedNetEvent(
    // ── NetEvent (core) ──────────────────────────────────────
    string Timestamp,
    string EventType,
    FWP_IP_VERSION IpVersion,
    byte IpProtocol,
    string ProtocolName,
    string LocalAddress,
    ushort LocalPort,
    string RemoteAddress,
    ushort RemotePort,
    string AppId,
    string UserId,
    ulong? FilterId,
    ushort? LayerId,
    string LayerName,
    uint Flags,
    string FlagsDecoded,

    // ── Correlated enriched filter (null if no FilterId match) ──
    WfpEnrichedFilter? Filter
);

using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace Components.Windows.Win32Api;

/// <summary>
/// Complete WFP engine state with enriched (cross-referenced) filters and net events.
/// Produced by <see cref="IWfp.GetEnrichedState"/>.
/// </summary>
public record WfpEnrichedState(
    WfpState State,
    List<WfpEngineOption> EngineOptions,
    List<WfpEnrichedFilter> Filters,
    List<WfpEnrichedNetEvent> NetEvents
);


================================================================================
FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\components\src\Components.Windows\Win32Api\Wfp\WfpErrorCodes.cs
================================================================================
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace Components.Windows.Win32Api;

// from fwpstypes.h, winerror.h
/// <summary>
/// WFP error codes.
/// </summary>
internal static class WfpErrorCodes
{
    private static readonly Dictionary<uint, string> s_names = new()
    {
        [0] = "ERROR_SUCCESS",
        [5] = "ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED",
        [6] = "ERROR_INVALID_HANDLE",
        [87] = "ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER",
        [1168] = "ERROR_NOT_FOUND",
        [0x80320001] = "FWP_E_CALLOUT_NOT_FOUND",
        [0x80320002] = "FWP_E_CONDITION_NOT_FOUND",
        [0x80320003] = "FWP_E_FILTER_NOT_FOUND",
        [0x80320004] = "FWP_E_LAYER_NOT_FOUND",
        [0x80320005] = "FWP_E_PROVIDER_NOT_FOUND",
        [0x80320006] = "FWP_E_PROVIDER_CONTEXT_NOT_FOUND",
        [0x80320007] = "FWP_E_SUBLAYER_NOT_FOUND",
        [0x80320008] = "FWP_E_NOT_FOUND",
        [0x80320009] = "FWP_E_ALREADY_EXISTS",
        [0x8032000A] = "FWP_E_IN_USE",
        [0x8032000B] = "FWP_E_DYNAMIC_SESSION_IN_PROGRESS",
        [0x8032000C] = "FWP_E_WRONG_SESSION",
        [0x8032000D] = "FWP_E_NO_TXN_IN_PROGRESS",
        [0x8032000E] = "FWP_E_TXN_IN_PROGRESS",
        [0x8032000F] = "FWP_E_TXN_ABORTED",
        [0x80320010] = "FWP_E_SESSION_ABORTED",
        [0x80320011] = "FWP_E_INCOMPATIBLE_TXN",
        [0x80320012] = "FWP_E_TIMEOUT",
        [0x80320013] = "FWP_E_NET_EVENTS_DISABLED",
        [0x80320014] = "FWP_E_INCOMPATIBLE_LAYER",
        [0x80320015] = "FWP_E_KM_CLIENTS_ONLY",
        [0x80320016] = "FWP_E_LIFETIME_MISMATCH",
        [0x80320017] = "FWP_E_BUILTIN_OBJECT",
        [0x80320018] = "FWP_E_TOO_MANY_CALLOUTS",
        [0x80320019] = "FWP_E_NOTIFICATION_DROPPED",
        [0x8032001A] = "FWP_E_TRAFFIC_MISMATCH",
    };

    public static string GetName(uint code) =>
        s_names.TryGetValue(code, out var name) ? name : $"0x{code:X8}";
}

/// <summary>
/// WFP exception with error code.
/// </summary>
public class WfpException(uint errorCode, string operation)
    : Exception($"{operation}: {WfpErrorCodes.GetName(errorCode)}")
{
    public uint ErrorCode { get; } = errorCode;
    public string Operation { get; } = operation;
}

    string LayerKey,
    string SubLayerKey,
    ulong EffectiveWeightNumeric,

    string ConditionsJson,
    string Action,
    string CalloutDriverKey,
    string ProviderContextKey
);
