================================================================================
FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\components\src\Components.Windows\Win32Api\Wfp\WfpService.cs
================================================================================
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.Json;
using HANDLE = System.IntPtr;

namespace Components.Windows.Win32Api;

public sealed class WfpService : IWfp
{
    private HANDLE _engineHandle;
    private Dictionary<ushort, string> _layerIdToName = new();

    public uint LastError { get; private set; }

    public string LastErrorName => WfpErrorCodes.GetName(LastError);

    public bool Connect()
    {
        HANDLE handle = IntPtr.Zero;
        uint result = FwpUClnt.FwpmEngineOpen0(null, 0xFFFFFFFF, IntPtr.Zero, IntPtr.Zero, ref handle);
        if (result == 0)
        {
            _engineHandle = handle;
            _layerIdToName = EnumerateLayers()
                .ToDictionary(l => l.LayerId, l => l.Name);
            LastError = 0;
            return true;
        }

        LastError = result;
        return false;
    }

    public WfpState GetCompleteState()
    {
        var layers = EnumerateLayers().ToList();
        var sublayers = EnumerateSublayers().ToList();
        var providers = EnumerateProviders().ToList();
        var providerContexts = EnumerateProviderContexts().ToList();
        var callouts = EnumerateCallouts().ToList();
        var filters = EnumerateFilters().ToList();
        var netEvents = EnumerateNetEvents().ToList();

        return new WfpState(layers, sublayers, providers, filters, providerContexts, callouts, netEvents);
    }

    public List<WfpEngineOption> GetEngineOptions()
    {
        var options = new List<WfpEngineOption>();

        foreach (FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION opt in Enum.GetValues(typeof(FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION)))
        {
            if (opt == FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION.FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION_MAX) continue;

            uint result = FwpUClnt.FwpmEngineGetOption0(_engineHandle, opt, out nint valuePtr);
            if (result != 0 || valuePtr == IntPtr.Zero) continue;

            try
            {
                // FWP_VALUE0: type (4 bytes) + pad (4 bytes on x64) + value union (8 bytes)
                uint value = (uint)Marshal.ReadInt32(valuePtr, 8);

                string description = opt switch
                {
                    FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION.FWPM_ENGINE_COLLECT_NET_EVENTS => value != 0 ? "Enabled" : "Disabled",
                    FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION.FWPM_ENGINE_NET_EVENT_MATCH_ANY_KEYWORDS => $"Keywords: 0x{value:X}",
                    FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION.FWPM_ENGINE_NAME_CACHE => value != 0 ? "Enabled" : "Disabled",
                    FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION.FWPM_ENGINE_MONITOR_IPSEC_CONNECTIONS => value != 0 ? "Enabled" : "Disabled",
                    FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION.FWPM_ENGINE_PACKET_QUEUING => DecodePacketQueuing(value),
                    FWPM_ENGINE_OPTION.FWPM_ENGINE_TXN_WATCHDOG_TIMEOUT_IN_MSEC => $"{value} ms",
                    _ => value.ToString()
                };

                options.Add(new WfpEngineOption(
                    opt.ToString().Replace("FWPM_ENGINE_", ""),
                    value,
                    description));
            }
            finally
            {
                FwpUClnt.FwpmFreeMemory0(ref valuePtr);
            }
        }

        return options;
    }

    private static string DecodePacketQueuing(uint value) => value switch
    {
        0 => "NONE",
        1 => "INBOUND",
        2 => "FORWARD",
        3 => "INBOUND | FORWARD",
        4 => "BATCH_INBOUND",
        5 => "INBOUND | BATCH_INBOUND",
        _ => $"0x{value:X}"
    };

    public List<WfpEnrichedFilter> EnrichFilters(WfpState state)
    {
        var layerDict = state.Layers.ToDictionary(l => l.LayerKey, l => l, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        var sublayerDict = state.Sublayers.ToDictionary(s => s.SubLayerKey, s => s, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        var providerDict = state.Providers.ToDictionary(p => p.ProviderKey, p => p, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        var calloutDict = state.Callouts.ToDictionary(c => c.CalloutKey, c => c, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        var ctxDict = state.ProviderContexts.ToDictionary(pc => pc.ProviderContextKey, pc => pc, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        var result = new List<WfpEnrichedFilter>(state.Filters.Count);

        foreach (var f in state.Filters)
        {
            layerDict.TryGetValue(f.LayerKey, out var layer);
            sublayerDict.TryGetValue(f.SubLayerKey, out var sublayer);
            providerDict.TryGetValue(f.ProviderKey, out var provider);
            calloutDict.TryGetValue(f.CalloutDriverKey, out var callout);
            ctxDict.TryGetValue(f.ProviderContextKey, out var ctx);

            result.Add(new WfpEnrichedFilter(
                f.FilterKey, f.FilterId, f.Name,
                f.FlagsValue, f.Flags,
                f.EffectiveWeightNumeric, f.EffectiveWeight,
                f.ConditionsCount, f.ConditionsJson,
                f.Action,
                IsBoottime: f.Flags.Contains("BOOTTIME", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase),
                HasClearActionRight: f.Flags.Contains("CLEAR_ACTION_RIGHT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase),
                // Layer
                f.LayerKey,
                LayerName: layer?.Name ?? "Unknown",
                LayerOrder: layer?.LayerId ?? 9999,
                // SubLayer
                f.SubLayerKey,
                SubLayerName: sublayer?.Name ?? "Unknown",
                SubLayerWeight: sublayer?.Weight ?? 0,
                // Provider
                f.ProviderKey,
                ProviderName: provider?.Name ?? "",
                ProviderDescription: provider?.Description ?? "",
                // Callout
                CalloutKey: f.CalloutDriverKey,
                CalloutName: callout?.Name ?? (string.IsNullOrEmpty(f.CalloutDriverKey) ? "" : "Unknown Callout"),
                // ProviderContext
                f.ProviderContextKey,
                ProviderContextName: ctx?.Name ?? (string.IsNullOrEmpty(f.ProviderContextKey) ? "" : "Unknown Context"),
                ProviderContextId: ctx?.ProviderContextId ?? 0,
                ProviderContextType: ctx?.Type ?? 0,
                ProviderContextTypeName: ctx?.TypeName ?? "",
                ProviderContextDataHex: ctx?.ProviderDataHex ?? "",
                ProviderContextDataBufferHex: ctx?.DataBufferHex ?? ""
            ));
        }

        return result;
    }

    public List<WfpEnrichedNetEvent> EnrichNetEvents(WfpState state, List<WfpEnrichedFilter> enrichedFilters)
    {
        var filterDict = enrichedFilters.ToDictionary(f => f.FilterId, f => f);
        var result = new List<WfpEnrichedNetEvent>(state.NetEvents.Count);

        foreach (var evt in state.NetEvents)
        {
            WfpEnrichedFilter? matched = null;
            if (evt.FilterId.HasValue)
                filterDict.TryGetValue(evt.FilterId.Value, out matched);

            result.Add(new WfpEnrichedNetEvent(
                evt.Timestamp, evt.EventType,
                evt.IpVersion, evt.IpProtocol, evt.ProtocolName,
                evt.LocalAddress, evt.LocalPort,
                evt.RemoteAddress, evt.RemotePort,
                evt.AppId, evt.UserId,
                evt.FilterId, evt.LayerId, evt.LayerName,
                evt.Flags, evt.FlagsDecoded,
                matched
            ));
        }

        return result;
    }

    public WfpEnrichedState GetEnrichedState()
    {
        var state = GetCompleteState();
        var filters = EnrichFilters(state);
        return new WfpEnrichedState(
            state,
            GetEngineOptions(),
            filters,
            EnrichNetEvents(state, filters));
    }

    public void Dispose()
    {
        if (_engineHandle != IntPtr.Zero)
        {
            FwpUClnt.FwpmEngineClose0(_engineHandle);
            _engineHandle = IntPtr.Zero;
        }
    }

    #region Enumeration Methods

    private IEnumerable<WfpLayer> EnumerateLayers() =>
        EnumerateWfpObjects<FWPM_LAYER0, WfpLayer>(
            FwpUClnt.FwpmLayerCreateEnumHandle0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmLayerEnum0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmLayerDestroyEnumHandle0,
            layer => new WfpLayer(
                layer.layerKey.ToString("B").ToUpper(),
                WfpKnownGuids.LayerGuidToName.TryGetValue(layer.layerKey, out var name)
                    ? name
                    : MarshalString(layer.displayData.name),
                layer.layerId,
                layer.defaultSubLayerKey.ToString("B").ToUpper()
            )
        );

    private IEnumerable<WfpSubLayer> EnumerateSublayers() =>
        EnumerateWfpObjects<FWPM_SUBLAYER0, WfpSubLayer>(
            FwpUClnt.FwpmSubLayerCreateEnumHandle0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmSubLayerEnum0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmSubLayerDestroyEnumHandle0,
            sublayer => new WfpSubLayer(
                sublayer.subLayerKey.ToString("B").ToUpper(),
                WfpKnownGuids.SublayerGuidToName.TryGetValue(sublayer.subLayerKey, out var name)
                    ? name
                    : MarshalString(sublayer.displayData.name),
                MarshalString(sublayer.displayData.description),
                sublayer.weight,
                sublayer.flags
            )
        );

    private IEnumerable<WfpProvider> EnumerateProviders() =>
        EnumerateWfpObjects<FWPM_PROVIDER0, WfpProvider>(
            FwpUClnt.FwpmProviderCreateEnumHandle0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmProviderEnum0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmProviderDestroyEnumHandle0,
            provider => new WfpProvider(
                provider.providerKey.ToString("B").ToUpper(),
                MarshalString(provider.displayData.name),
                MarshalString(provider.displayData.description)
            )
        );

    private IEnumerable<WfpProviderContext> EnumerateProviderContexts() =>
        EnumerateWfpObjects<FWPM_PROVIDER_CONTEXT0, WfpProviderContext>(
            FwpUClnt.FwpmProviderContextCreateEnumHandle0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmProviderContextEnum0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmProviderContextDestroyEnumHandle0,
            context =>
            {
                var providerKey = context.providerKey != IntPtr.Zero
                    ? Marshal.PtrToStructure<Guid>(context.providerKey).ToString("B").ToUpper()
                    : string.Empty;

                var (provDataHex, dataBuffHex) = ReadProviderContextBlobs(context.providerData, context.dataBuffer, context.type);

                return new WfpProviderContext(
                    context.providerContextKey.ToString("B").ToUpper(),
                    MarshalString(context.displayData.name),
                    MarshalString(context.displayData.description),
                    context.type,
                    GetProviderContextTypeName(context.type),
                    context.providerContextId,
                    providerKey,
                    provDataHex,
                    dataBuffHex
                );
            }
        );

    private IEnumerable<WfpCallout> EnumerateCallouts() =>
        EnumerateWfpObjects<FWPM_CALLOUT0, WfpCallout>(
            FwpUClnt.FwpmCalloutCreateEnumHandle0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmCalloutEnum0,
            FwpUClnt.FwpmCalloutDestroyEnumHandle0,
            callout => new WfpCallout(
                callout.calloutKey.ToString("B").ToUpper(),
                MarshalString(callout.displayData.name),
                MarshalString(callout.displayData.description),
                callout.applicableLayer,
                callout.calloutId
            )
        );

    private IEnumerable<WfpFilter> EnumerateFilters()
    {
        nint enumHandle = IntPtr.Zero;
        nint entriesPtr = IntPtr.Zero;

        try
        {
            if (FwpUClnt.FwpmFilterCreateEnumHandle0(_engineHandle, IntPtr.Zero, ref enumHandle) != 0)
                yield break;

            if (FwpUClnt.FwpmFilterEnum0(_engineHandle, enumHandle, 10000, ref entriesPtr, out uint numEntries) != 0)
                yield break;

            for (uint i = 0; i < numEntries; i++)
            {
                var filterPtr = Marshal.ReadIntPtr(entriesPtr + (int)(i * IntPtr.Size));
                var filter = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWPM_FILTER0>(filterPtr);

                var (condCount, condJson) = GetFilterConditionsJson(filter);
                var providerKey = filter.providerKey != IntPtr.Zero
                    ? Marshal.PtrToStructure<Guid>(filter.providerKey).ToString("B").ToUpper()
                    : string.Empty;

                var effectiveWeightNum = GetWeightNumeric(filter.effectiveWeight);

                var actionType = filter.action.type & 0x0F;
                var calloutDriverKey = (actionType is 3 or 4 or 5)
                    ? filter.action.filterType.ToString("B").ToUpper()
                    : string.Empty;

                var providerContextKey = filter.contextUnion.providerContextKey != Guid.Empty
                    ? filter.contextUnion.providerContextKey.ToString("B").ToUpper()
                    : string.Empty;

                yield return new WfpFilter(
                    filter.filterKey.ToString("B").ToUpper(),
                    filter.filterId,
                    MarshalString(filter.displayData.name),
                    filter.flags.ToString("B").ToUpper(),
                    GetFilterFlags(filter.flags),
                    providerKey,
                    filter.layerKey.ToString("B").ToUpper(),
                    filter.subLayerKey.ToString("B").ToUpper(),
                    effectiveWeightNum,
                    $"0x{effectiveWeightNum:X}",
                    condCount,
                    condJson,
                    GetActionType(filter.action.type),
                    calloutDriverKey,
                    providerContextKey
                );
            }
        }
        finally
        {
            if (entriesPtr != IntPtr.Zero) FwpUClnt.FwpmFreeMemory0(ref entriesPtr);
            if (enumHandle != IntPtr.Zero) FwpUClnt.FwpmFilterDestroyEnumHandle0(_engineHandle, enumHandle);
        }
    }

    private List<WfpNetEvent> EnumerateNetEvents()
    {
        var events = new List<WfpNetEvent>();
        nint enumHandle = IntPtr.Zero;
        nint entriesPtr = IntPtr.Zero;

        try
        {
            if (FwpUClnt.FwpmNetEventCreateEnumHandle0(_engineHandle, IntPtr.Zero, ref enumHandle) != 0)
                return events;

            if (FwpUClnt.FwpmNetEventEnum2(_engineHandle, enumHandle, 1000, ref entriesPtr, out uint numEntries) != 0)
                return events;

            for (uint i = 0; i < numEntries; i++)
            {
                var eventPtr = Marshal.ReadIntPtr(entriesPtr, (int)(i * IntPtr.Size));
                if (eventPtr == IntPtr.Zero) continue;

                try
                {
                    var netEvent = ParseNetEvent(eventPtr);
                    if (netEvent != null)
                        events.Add(netEvent);
                }
                catch
                {
                    // Skip corrupted events
                }
            }
        }
        finally
        {
            if (entriesPtr != IntPtr.Zero) FwpUClnt.FwpmFreeMemory0(ref entriesPtr);
            if (enumHandle != IntPtr.Zero) FwpUClnt.FwpmNetEventDestroyEnumHandle0(_engineHandle, enumHandle);
        }

        return events;
    }

    #endregion

    #region Generic Enumeration

    private delegate uint CreateEnumHandleDelegate(nint engineHandle, nint enumTemplate, ref nint enumHandle);
    private delegate uint EnumObjectsDelegate(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle, uint numEntriesRequested, ref nint entries, out uint numEntriesReturned);
    private delegate uint DestroyEnumHandleDelegate(nint engineHandle, nint enumHandle);

    private IEnumerable<TResult> EnumerateWfpObjects<TNative, TResult>(
        CreateEnumHandleDelegate createEnum,
        EnumObjectsDelegate enumFunc,
        DestroyEnumHandleDelegate destroyEnum,
        Func<TNative, TResult> mapper) where TNative : struct
    {
        nint enumHandle = IntPtr.Zero;
        nint entriesPtr = IntPtr.Zero;

        try
        {
            if (createEnum(_engineHandle, IntPtr.Zero, ref enumHandle) != 0)
                yield break;

            if (enumFunc(_engineHandle, enumHandle, 1000, ref entriesPtr, out uint numEntries) != 0)
                yield break;

            for (uint i = 0; i < numEntries; i++)
            {
                var objPtr = Marshal.ReadIntPtr(entriesPtr + (int)(i * IntPtr.Size));
                var obj = Marshal.PtrToStructure<TNative>(objPtr);
                yield return mapper(obj);
            }
        }
        finally
        {
            if (entriesPtr != IntPtr.Zero) FwpUClnt.FwpmFreeMemory0(ref entriesPtr);
            if (enumHandle != IntPtr.Zero) destroyEnum(_engineHandle, enumHandle);
        }
    }

    #endregion

    #region Net Event Parsing

    private WfpNetEvent? ParseNetEvent(nint eventPtr)
    {
        var evt = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWPM_NET_EVENT2>(eventPtr);
        ref readonly var h = ref evt.header;

        string timestamp = DateTime.FromFileTimeUtc(h.timeStamp).ToString("yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.fffZ");

        string localAddr, remoteAddr;
        if (h.ipVersion == FWP_IP_VERSION.FWP_IP_VERSION_V4)
        {
            localAddr = IntToIPv4(h.localAddr.ipv4);
            remoteAddr = IntToIPv4(h.remoteAddr.ipv4);
        }
        else if (h.ipVersion == FWP_IP_VERSION.FWP_IP_VERSION_V6)
        {
            localAddr = BytesToIPv6(h.localAddr.ipv6.ToArray());
            remoteAddr = BytesToIPv6(h.remoteAddr.ipv6.ToArray());
        }
        else
        {
            localAddr = "";
            remoteAddr = "";
        }

        string appId = ReadByteBlob(h.appId);
        string userId = ReadSidPtr(h.userId);
        string eventTypeName = GetEventTypeName((uint)evt.type);
        var (filterId, layerId) = ReadWfpFilterTyped(evt.eventData, evt.type);
        string layerName = ResolveLayerName(layerId);

        return new WfpNetEvent(
            timestamp,
            eventTypeName,
            h.ipVersion,
            h.ipProtocol,
            GetProtocolName(h.ipProtocol),
            localAddr,
            h.localPort,
            remoteAddr,
            h.remotePort,
            appId,
            userId,
            filterId,
            layerId,
            layerName,
            h.flags,
            DecodeNetEventFlags(h.flags)
        );
    }

    private static string ReadByteBlob(FWP_BYTE_BLOB blob)
    {
        try
        {
            if (blob.size == 0 || blob.size >= 4096 || blob.data == IntPtr.Zero)
                return "";

            byte[] bytes = new byte[blob.size];
            Marshal.Copy(blob.data, bytes, 0, (int)blob.size);
            return Encoding.Unicode.GetString(bytes).TrimEnd('\0');
        }
        catch { return ""; }
    }

    private static string ReadSidPtr(nint sidPtr)
    {
        try
        {
            if (sidPtr == IntPtr.Zero || (long)sidPtr <= 0x10000)
                return "";

            if (AdvApi32.ConvertSidToStringSid(sidPtr, out nint sidStringPtr))
            {
                string sid = Marshal.PtrToStringUni(sidStringPtr) ?? "";
                KERNEL32.LocalFree(sidStringPtr);
                return sid;
            }
        }
        catch (Exception) { /* Invalid SID pointer or access violation */ }
        return "";
    }

    private static (ulong?, ushort?) ReadWfpFilterTyped(nint eventData, FWPM_NET_EVENT_TYPE type)
    {
        if (type != FWPM_NET_EVENT_TYPE.FWPM_NET_EVENT_TYPE_CLASSIFY_DROP &&
            type != FWPM_NET_EVENT_TYPE.FWPM_NET_EVENT_TYPE_CLASSIFY_ALLOW)
            return (null, null);

        if (eventData == IntPtr.Zero)
            return (null, null);

        try
        {
            var drop = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWPM_NET_EVENT_CLASSIFY_DROP0>(eventData);

            if (drop.filterId > 0 && drop.layerId > 0 && drop.layerId < 200)
                return (drop.filterId, drop.layerId);
        }
        catch (Exception) { /* Corrupted event data */ }

        return (null, null);
    }

    private string ResolveLayerName(ushort? layerId) =>
        layerId.HasValue && _layerIdToName.TryGetValue(layerId.Value, out var name)
            ? name
            : layerId.HasValue ? $"Layer_{layerId.Value}" : "";

    #endregion

    #region Filter Conditions

    private static (int Count, string Json) GetFilterConditionsJson(FWPM_FILTER0 filter)
    {
        if (filter.numFilterConditions == 0 || filter.filterCondition == IntPtr.Zero)
            return (0, "[]");

        var conditions = new List<object>((int)filter.numFilterConditions);
        int condSize = Marshal.SizeOf<FWPM_FILTER_CONDITION0>();

        for (uint i = 0; i < filter.numFilterConditions; i++)
        {
            try
            {
                var condPtr = filter.filterCondition + (int)(i * condSize);
                var cond = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWPM_FILTER_CONDITION0>(condPtr);

                string fieldName = WfpKnownGuids.ConditionFieldGuids.TryGetValue(cond.fieldKey, out var fk)
                    ? fk
                    : cond.fieldKey.ToString("B");

                conditions.Add(new
                {
                    fieldKey = fieldName,
                    matchType = GetMatchTypeName(cond.matchType),
                    conditionValue = GetConditionValueObject(cond.conditionValue)
                });
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                conditions.Add(new { error = ex.Message });
            }
        }

        return ((int)filter.numFilterConditions, JsonSerializer.Serialize(conditions));
    }

    // from fwptypes.h FWP_DATA_TYPE_XXX
    private static object GetConditionValueObject(FWP_CONDITION_VALUE0 value)
    {
        long raw = ((IntPtr)value.value).ToInt64();

        return value.type switch
        {
            0 => new { type = "EMPTY" },
            1 => (object)new { type = "UINT8", value = (byte)(raw & 0xFF) },
            2 => new { type = "UINT16", value = (ushort)(raw & 0xFFFF) },
            3 => new { type = "UINT32", value = (uint)(raw & 0xFFFFFFFF) },
            4 => new { type = "UINT64", value = value.value != IntPtr.Zero ? (ulong)Marshal.ReadInt64(value.value) : 0UL },
            11 => ParseByteArray16(value.value),
            12 => ParseByteBlob(value.value),
            13 => ParseSid(value.value),
            14 => ParseSecurityDescriptor(value.value),
            256 => ParseV4AddrMask(value.value),
            257 => ParseV6AddrMask(value.value),
            258 => ParseRange(value.value),
            _ => new { type = $"UNKNOWN_{value.type}" }
        };
    }

    private static object ParseSid(nint ptr)
    {
        if (ptr == IntPtr.Zero)
            return new { type = "SID", sid = "NULL" };

        try
        {
            if (AdvApi32.ConvertSidToStringSid(ptr, out nint sidStringPtr))
            {
                string sidString = Marshal.PtrToStringUni(sidStringPtr) ?? "INVALID";
                KERNEL32.LocalFree(sidStringPtr);
                return new { type = "SID", sid = sidString };
            }
        }
        catch (Exception) { /* Invalid SID */ }

        return new { type = "SID", sid = "PARSE_ERROR" };
    }

    private static object ParseByteArray16(nint ptr)
    {
        if (ptr == IntPtr.Zero)
            return new { type = "BYTE_ARRAY16" };

        try
        {
            byte[] bytes = new byte[16];
            Marshal.Copy(ptr, bytes, 0, 16);
            return new { type = "BYTE_ARRAY16", value = BytesToIPv6(bytes) };
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            return new { type = "BYTE_ARRAY16", error = ex.Message };
        }
    }

    private static object ParseSecurityDescriptor(nint ptr)
    {
        if (ptr == IntPtr.Zero)
            return new { type = "SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR" };

        try
        {
            var blob = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWP_BYTE_BLOB>(ptr);
            if (blob.size == 0 || blob.data == IntPtr.Zero)
                return new { type = "SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR", sd = "EMPTY" };

            if (AdvApi32.ConvertSecurityDescriptorToStringSecurityDescriptor(
                blob.data, 1, 15, out nint sddlPtr, out _))
            {
                string sddl = Marshal.PtrToStringUni(sddlPtr) ?? "INVALID";
                KERNEL32.LocalFree(sddlPtr);
                return new { type = "SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR", sd = sddl };
            }
        }
        catch (Exception) { /* Corrupted SD */ }

        return new { type = "SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR", sd = "PARSE_ERROR" };
    }

    private static object ParseByteBlob(nint ptr)
    {
        if (ptr == IntPtr.Zero) return new { type = "BYTE_BLOB" };

        var blob = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWP_BYTE_BLOB>(ptr);
        if (blob.size == 0 || blob.data == IntPtr.Zero || blob.size >= 4096)
            return new { type = "BYTE_BLOB" };

        var data = new byte[blob.size];
        Marshal.Copy(blob.data, data, 0, (int)blob.size);

        try
        {
            var decoded = Encoding.Unicode.GetString(data).TrimEnd('\0');
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(decoded) && decoded.All(c => !char.IsControl(c) || c == '\0'))
                return new { type = "BYTE_BLOB", asString = decoded };
        }
        catch (Exception) { /* Binary data not decodable as Unicode */ }

        return new { type = "BYTE_BLOB", hex = BitConverter.ToString(data).Replace("-", "").ToLower() };
    }

    private static object ParseV4AddrMask(nint ptr)
    {
        if (ptr == IntPtr.Zero) return new { type = "V4_ADDR_MASK" };
        var mask = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWP_V4_ADDR_AND_MASK>(ptr);
        return new { type = "V4_ADDR_MASK", addr = IntToIPv4(mask.addr), mask = IntToIPv4(mask.mask) };
    }

    private static object ParseV6AddrMask(nint ptr)
    {
        if (ptr == IntPtr.Zero) return new { type = "V6_ADDR_MASK" };
        var mask = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWP_V6_ADDR_AND_MASK>(ptr);
        return new { type = "V6_ADDR_MASK", addr = BytesToIPv6(mask.addr), prefixLength = mask.prefixLength };
    }

    private static object ParseRange(nint ptr)
    {
        if (ptr == IntPtr.Zero) return new { type = "RANGE" };
        var range = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWP_RANGE0>(ptr);
        return new { type = "RANGE", valueLow = GetSimpleValue(range.valueLow), valueHigh = GetSimpleValue(range.valueHigh) };
    }

    private static object GetSimpleValue(FWP_VALUE0 value)
    {
        long raw = ((IntPtr)value.value).ToInt64();

        return value.type switch
        {
            1 => (object)(byte)(raw & 0xFF),
            2 => (ushort)(raw & 0xFFFF),
            3 => IntToIPv4((uint)(raw & 0xFFFFFFFF)),
            4 => value.value != IntPtr.Zero ? (object)(ulong)Marshal.ReadInt64(value.value) : 0UL,
            11 => ParseByteArray16Simple(value.value),
            _ => $"Type{value.type}"
        };
    }

    private static string ParseByteArray16Simple(nint ptr)
    {
        if (ptr == IntPtr.Zero) return "::";
        try
        {
            byte[] bytes = new byte[16];
            Marshal.Copy(ptr, bytes, 0, 16);
            return BytesToIPv6(bytes);
        }
        catch { return "::"; }
    }

    #endregion

    #region Helper Methods

    private static string MarshalString(nint ptr) =>
        ptr != IntPtr.Zero ? Marshal.PtrToStringUni(ptr) ?? string.Empty : string.Empty;

    private static string GetFilterFlags(uint flags)
    {
        // from wfpmtypes.h FWPM_FILTER_FLAG_XXX
        var f = new List<string>();
        if ((flags & 0x0001) != 0) f.Add("PERSISTENT");
        if ((flags & 0x0002) != 0) f.Add("BOOTTIME");
        if ((flags & 0x0004) != 0) f.Add("HAS_PROVIDER_CONTEXT");
        if ((flags & 0x0008) != 0) f.Add("CLEAR_ACTION_RIGHT");
        if ((flags & 0x0010) != 0) f.Add("PERMIT_IF_CALLOUT_UNREGISTERED");
        if ((flags & 0x0020) != 0) f.Add("DISABLED");
        if ((flags & 0x0040) != 0) f.Add("INDEXED");
        if ((flags & 0x0080) != 0) f.Add("HAS_SECURITY_REALM_PROVIDER_CONTEXT");
        if ((flags & 0x0100) != 0) f.Add("SYSTEMOS_ONLY");
        if ((flags & 0x0200) != 0) f.Add("GAMEOS_ONLY");
        if ((flags & 0x0400) != 0) f.Add("SILENT_MODE");
        if ((flags & 0x0800) != 0) f.Add("IPSEC_NO_ACQUIRE_INITIATE");
        if ((flags & 0x1000) != 0) f.Add("HAS_FILTER_ORIGIN");
        if ((flags & 0x2000) != 0) f.Add("RESERVED1");
        if ((flags & 0x4000) != 0) f.Add("RESERVED2");
        return f.Count > 0 ? string.Join(", ", f) : "NONE";
    }

    // from fwpmtypes.h FWPM_PROVIDER_CONTEXT_TYPE
    private static string GetProviderContextTypeName(uint type) => type switch
    {
        0 => "IPSEC_KEYING_CONTEXT",
        1 => "IPSEC_IKE_QM_TRANSPORT_CONTEXT",
        2 => "IPSEC_IKE_QM_TUNNEL_CONTEXT",
        3 => "IPSEC_AUTHIP_QM_TRANSPORT_CONTEXT",
        4 => "IPSEC_AUTHIP_QM_TUNNEL_CONTEXT",
        5 => "IPSEC_IKE_MM_CONTEXT",
        6 => "IPSEC_AUTHIP_MM_CONTEXT",
        7 => "CLASSIFY_OPTIONS_CONTEXT",
        8 => "GENERAL_CONTEXT",
        9 => "IPSEC_IKEV2_QM_TUNNEL_CONTEXT",
        10 => "IPSEC_IKEV2_MM_CONTEXT",
        11 => "IPSEC_DOSP_CONTEXT",
        12 => "IPSEC_IKEV2_QM_TRANSPORT_CONTEXT",
        13 => "NETWORK_CONNECTION_POLICY_CONTEXT",
        _ => $"UNKNOWN_{type}"
    };

    private static ulong GetWeightNumeric(FWP_VALUE0 weight) => weight.type switch
    {
        1 => (byte)(((IntPtr)weight.value).ToInt64() & 0xFF),
        4 => weight.value != IntPtr.Zero ? (ulong)Marshal.ReadInt64(weight.value) : 0,
        _ => 0
    };

    // from fwptypes.h FWP_ACTION_TYPE
    private static string GetActionType(uint actionType) => (actionType & 0x0F) switch
    {
        1 => "BLOCK",
        2 => "PERMIT",
        3 => "CALLOUT_TERMINATING",
        4 => "CALLOUT_INSPECTION",
        5 => "CALLOUT_UNKNOWN",
        _ => $"UNKNOWN_{actionType:X}"
    };

    // from fwptypes.h FWP_MATCH_XXX
    private static string GetMatchTypeName(uint matchType) => matchType switch
    {
        0 => "EQUAL",
        1 => "GREATER",
        2 => "LESS",
        3 => "GREATER_OR_EQUAL",
        4 => "LESS_OR_EQUAL",
        5 => "RANGE",
        6 => "FLAGS_ALL_SET",
        7 => "FLAGS_ANY_SET",
        8 => "FLAGS_NONE_SET",
        9 => "EQUAL_CASE_INSENSITIVE",
        10 => "NOT_EQUAL",
        11 => "PREFIX",
        12 => "NOT_PREFIX",
        _ => $"FWP_MATCH_UNKNOWN_{matchType}"
    };

    // from fwpmtypes.h FWPM_NET_EVENT_FLAG_XXX
    private static string DecodeNetEventFlags(uint flags)
    {
        if (flags == 0) return "NONE";

        var f = new List<string>();
        if ((flags & 0x0001) != 0) f.Add("IP_PROTOCOL_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0002) != 0) f.Add("LOCAL_ADDR_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0004) != 0) f.Add("REMOTE_ADDR_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0008) != 0) f.Add("LOCAL_PORT_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0010) != 0) f.Add("REMOTE_PORT_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0020) != 0) f.Add("APP_ID_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0040) != 0) f.Add("USER_ID_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0080) != 0) f.Add("SCOPE_ID_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0100) != 0) f.Add("IP_VERSION_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0200) != 0) f.Add("REAUTH_REASON_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0400) != 0) f.Add("PACKAGE_ID_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x0800) != 0) f.Add("ENTERPRISE_ID_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x1000) != 0) f.Add("POLICY_FLAGS_SET");
        if ((flags & 0x2000) != 0) f.Add("EFFECTIVE_NAME_SET");
        return f.Count > 0 ? string.Join(", ", f) : $"0x{flags:X}";
    }

    // from fwpmtypes.h FWPM_NET_EVENT_TYPE
    private static string GetEventTypeName(uint eventType) =>
        eventType <= 11
            ? ((FWPM_NET_EVENT_TYPE)eventType).ToString().Replace("FWPM_NET_EVENT_TYPE_", "")
            : $"UNKNOWN_{eventType}";

    // from ws2def.h IPPROTO_XXX
    private static string GetProtocolName(int protocolNumber) => protocolNumber switch
    {
        0 => "HOPOPTS",
        1 => "ICMP",
        2 => "IGMP",
        3 => "GGP",
        4 => "IPV4",
        5 => "ST",
        6 => "TCP",
        7 => "CBT",
        8 => "EGP",
        9 => "IGP",
        12 => "PUP",
        17 => "UDP",
        22 => "IDP",
        27 => "RDP",
        41 => "IPV6",
        43 => "ROUTING",
        44 => "FRAGMENT",
        50 => "ESP",
        51 => "AH",
        58 => "ICMPV6",
        59 => "NONE",
        60 => "DSTOPTS",
        77 => "ND",
        78 => "ICLFXBM",
        103 => "PIM",
        113 => "PGM",
        115 => "L2TP",
        132 => "SCTP",
        255 => "RAW",
        257 => "RESERVED_RAW",
        258 => "RESERVED_IPSEC",
        259 => "RESERVED_IPSECOFFLOAD",
        260 => "RESERVED_WNV",
        _ => $"IPPROTO_UNKNOWN_{protocolNumber}"
    };

    private static string IntToIPv4(uint ip) =>
        $"{(ip >> 24) & 0xFF}.{(ip >> 16) & 0xFF}.{(ip >> 8) & 0xFF}.{ip & 0xFF}";

    private static string BytesToIPv6(byte[] bytes)
    {
        if (bytes?.Length != 16) return "::";
        var segments = Enumerable.Range(0, 8).Select(i => (ushort)((bytes[i * 2] << 8) | bytes[i * 2 + 1]));
        return string.Join(":", segments.Select(s => s.ToString("x")));
    }

    private static (string provDataHex, string dataBuffHex)
        ReadProviderContextBlobs(FWP_BYTE_BLOB providerData, nint dataBuffer, uint contextType)
    {
        string provDataHex = "";
        string dataBuffHex = "";

        if (providerData.size > 0 && providerData.data != IntPtr.Zero && providerData.size < 1048576)
        {
            try
            {
                byte[] provBytes = new byte[providerData.size];
                Marshal.Copy(providerData.data, provBytes, 0, (int)providerData.size);
                provDataHex = BitConverter.ToString(provBytes).Replace("-", "").ToLower();
            }
            catch (Exception) { /* Corrupted provider data blob */ }
        }

        if (dataBuffer != IntPtr.Zero && contextType == 8)
        {
            try
            {
                var blob = Marshal.PtrToStructure<FWP_BYTE_BLOB>(dataBuffer);
                if (blob.size > 0 && blob.data != IntPtr.Zero && blob.size < 1048576)
                {
                    byte[] buffBytes = new byte[blob.size];
                    Marshal.Copy(blob.data, buffBytes, 0, (int)blob.size);
                    dataBuffHex = BitConverter.ToString(buffBytes).Replace("-", "").ToLower();
                }
            }
            catch (Exception) { /* Corrupted data buffer blob */ }
        }

        return (provDataHex, dataBuffHex);
    }

    #endregion
}

using Components.Windows.Wmi.CimV2;

namespace Components.Windows.Wmi;

public class FirewallProduct : meta_class
{
    public string InstanceGuid { get; set; }
    public string DisplayName { get; set; }
    public string PathToSignedProductExe { get; set; }
    public string PathToSignedReportingExe { get; set; }
    public uint ProductState { get; set; }
    public string Timestamp { get; set; }
}

namespace Components.Windows.Wmi;

public class FirewallProduct2 : FirewallProduct
{
    private uint _productState;
    public new uint ProductState
    {
        get => _productState;
        set
        {
            _productState = value;
            ProductStatus = (FW_ProductStatus)value & FW_ProductStatus.Mask;
            SignatureStatus = (FW_SignatureStatus)value & FW_SignatureStatus.Mask;
            ProductOwner = (FW_ProductOwner)value & FW_ProductOwner.Mask;
        }
    }

    public FW_ProductStatus ProductStatus { get; private set; }
    public FW_SignatureStatus SignatureStatus { get; private set; }
    public FW_ProductOwner ProductOwner { get; private set; }

}

FILE: C:\Users\Vin\source\repos\sdh-complianceapp\components\test\Components.Windows.Tests\Wfp\WfpService_EnrichmentTests.cs
================================================================================
using System.Security.Principal;
using Components.Windows.Win32Api;

namespace Components.Windows.Tests.Win32Api;

/// <summary>
/// Integration tests for WfpService enrichment methods and GetEnrichedState().
/// Requires elevated (Administrator) execution.
/// </summary>
[TestClass]
public class WfpService_EnrichmentTests
{
    private static IWfp? _wfp;
    private static WfpState? _state;
    private static List<WfpEnrichedFilter>? _enrichedFilters;
    private static List<WfpEnrichedNetEvent>? _enrichedEvents;
    private static WfpEnrichedState? _enrichedState;

    [ClassInitialize]
    public static void ConnectAndEnrich(TestContext _)
    {
        using var identity = WindowsIdentity.GetCurrent();
        var principal = new WindowsPrincipal(identity);
        if (!principal.IsInRole(WindowsBuiltInRole.Administrator))
        {
            Assert.Inconclusive("WFP enrichment requires Administrator privileges. Run tests elevated.");
        }

        _wfp = new WfpService();
        var connected = _wfp.Connect();
        Assert.IsTrue(connected, $"WFP engine connection failed ({_wfp.LastErrorName}).");

        _state = _wfp.GetCompleteState();
        _enrichedFilters = _wfp.EnrichFilters(_state);
        _enrichedEvents = _wfp.EnrichNetEvents(_state, _enrichedFilters);
        _enrichedState = _wfp.GetEnrichedState();
    }

    [ClassCleanup]
    public static void Cleanup() => _wfp?.Dispose();

    // ── EnrichFilters ───────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public void EnrichFilters_ShouldReturn_SameCountAsRawFilters()
    {
        Assert.AreEqual(_state!.Filters.Count, _enrichedFilters!.Count,
            "Enriched filter count should match raw filter count.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void EnrichFilters_ShouldResolve_LayerAndSubLayerNames()
    {
        var withLayerName = _enrichedFilters!.Where(f => f.LayerName != "Unknown").ToList();
        Assert.IsTrue(withLayerName.Count > 0,
            "Expected at least some filters with resolved LayerName.");

        var withSubLayerName = _enrichedFilters!.Where(f => f.SubLayerName != "Unknown").ToList();
        Assert.IsTrue(withSubLayerName.Count > 0,
            "Expected at least some filters with resolved SubLayerName.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void EnrichFilters_ShouldResolve_ProviderName()
    {
        var withProvider = _enrichedFilters!.Where(f => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(f.ProviderName)).ToList();
        Assert.IsTrue(withProvider.Count > 0,
            "Expected at least some filters with resolved ProviderName.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void EnrichFilters_ShouldCompute_IsBoottime()
    {
        var boottimeFilters = _enrichedFilters!.Where(f => f.IsBoottime).ToList();
        var nonBoottimeFilters = _enrichedFilters!.Where(f => !f.IsBoottime).ToList();

        Assert.IsTrue(nonBoottimeFilters.Count > 0,
            "Expected at least some non-boottime filters.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void EnrichFilters_LayerOrder_ShouldMatch_RawLayerIds()
    {
        var layerIdDict = _state!.Layers.ToDictionary(l => l.LayerKey, l => l.LayerId, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        foreach (var f in _enrichedFilters!.Where(f => f.LayerName != "Unknown"))
        {
            if (layerIdDict.TryGetValue(f.LayerKey, out var expectedId))
            {
                Assert.AreEqual(expectedId, f.LayerOrder,
                    $"Filter {f.FilterId}: LayerOrder {f.LayerOrder} does not match raw LayerId {expectedId}.");
            }
        }
    }

    // ── EnrichNetEvents ─────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public void EnrichNetEvents_ShouldReturn_SameCountAsRawEvents()
    {
        Assert.AreEqual(_state!.NetEvents.Count, _enrichedEvents!.Count,
            "Enriched event count should match raw event count.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void EnrichNetEvents_DropOrAllow_ShouldHave_CorrelatedFilter()
    {
        var classifiedEvents = _enrichedEvents!
            .Where(e => e.EventType is "CLASSIFY_DROP" or "CLASSIFY_ALLOW")
            .Where(e => e.FilterId.HasValue)
            .ToList();

        if (classifiedEvents.Count == 0)
        {
            Assert.Inconclusive("No DROP/ALLOW events with FilterId to validate enrichment.");
        }

        var withFilter = classifiedEvents.Where(e => e.Filter is not null).ToList();
        Assert.IsTrue(withFilter.Count > 0,
            "Expected at least some classified events with a correlated WfpEnrichedFilter.");

        foreach (var evt in withFilter)
        {
            Assert.AreEqual(evt.FilterId, evt.Filter!.FilterId,
                $"NetEvent FilterId {evt.FilterId} should match correlated Filter.FilterId {evt.Filter.FilterId}.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(evt.Filter.Name),
                "Correlated filter should have a non-empty Name.");
        }
    }

    // ── GetEnrichedState (facade) ───────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public void GetEnrichedState_ShouldReturn_AllCollections()
    {
        Assert.IsNotNull(_enrichedState!.State, "State should not be null.");
        Assert.IsNotNull(_enrichedState.EngineOptions, "EngineOptions should not be null.");
        Assert.IsNotNull(_enrichedState.Filters, "Filters should not be null.");
        Assert.IsNotNull(_enrichedState.NetEvents, "NetEvents should not be null.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void GetEnrichedState_Filters_ShouldMatch_RawFilterCount()
    {
        Assert.AreEqual(
            _enrichedState!.State.Filters.Count,
            _enrichedState.Filters.Count,
            "GetEnrichedState().Filters count should match raw State.Filters count.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void GetEnrichedState_EngineOptions_ShouldContain_CollectNetEvents()
    {
        var option = _enrichedState!.EngineOptions.Find(o => o.Name == "COLLECT_NET_EVENTS");
        Assert.IsNotNull(option, "COLLECT_NET_EVENTS option not found in GetEnrichedState().");
    }
}

using System.Security.Principal;
using Components.Windows.Win32Api;

namespace Components.Windows.Tests.Win32Api;

/// <summary>
/// Integration tests for WfpService.GetCompleteState().
/// Requires elevated (Administrator) execution to enumerate WFP objects.
/// </summary>
[TestClass]
public class WfpService_GetCompleteStateTests
{
    private static WfpState? _state;
    private static IWfp? _wfp;

    [ClassInitialize]
    public static void ConnectAndSnapshot(TestContext _)
    {
        using var identity = WindowsIdentity.GetCurrent();
        var principal = new WindowsPrincipal(identity);
        if (!principal.IsInRole(WindowsBuiltInRole.Administrator))
        {
            Assert.Inconclusive("WFP enumeration requires Administrator privileges. Run tests elevated.");
        }

        _wfp = new WfpService();
        var connected = _wfp.Connect();
        Assert.IsTrue(connected, $"WFP engine connection failed (error 0x{_wfp.LastError:X}).");
        _state = _wfp.GetCompleteState();
    }

    [ClassCleanup]
    public static void Cleanup() => _wfp?.Dispose();

    // ── Layers ──────────────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    [DataRow("ALE_AUTH_LISTEN_V4")]
    [DataRow("ALE_AUTH_LISTEN_V6")]
    [DataRow("ALE_AUTH_CONNECT_V4")]
    [DataRow("ALE_AUTH_CONNECT_V6")]
    public void Layers_ShouldContain_WellKnownLayer(string expectedName)
    {
        var match = _state!.Layers.Find(l => l.Name == expectedName);
        Assert.IsNotNull(match, $"Expected layer '{expectedName}' not found.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void Layers_ShouldHave_UniqueOrderedLayerIds()
    {
        var ids = _state!.Layers.Select(l => l.LayerId).ToList();
        Assert.IsTrue(ids.Count > 0, "No layers returned.");

        var distinct = ids.Distinct().ToList();
        Assert.AreEqual(ids.Count, distinct.Count, "LayerId values are not unique.");
    }

    // ── Sublayers ───────────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    [DataRow("TEREDO")]
    [DataRow("IPSEC_TUNNEL")]
    [DataRow("MPSSVC_WSH")]
    public void Sublayers_ShouldContain_WellKnownSublayer_WithPositiveWeight(string expectedName)
    {
        var match = _state!.Sublayers.Find(s => s.Name == expectedName);
        Assert.IsNotNull(match, $"Expected sublayer '{expectedName}' not found.");
        Assert.IsTrue(match.Weight > 0, $"Sublayer '{expectedName}' has Weight={match.Weight}, expected > 0.");
    }

    // ── Providers ───────────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public void Providers_ShouldContain_MultipleMicrosoftCorporationEntries()
    {
        var msProviders = _state!.Providers.Where(p => p.Name == "Microsoft Corporation").ToList();
        Assert.IsTrue(msProviders.Count > 1,
            $"Expected multiple providers named 'Microsoft Corporation', found {msProviders.Count}.");
    }

    // ── Filters ─────────────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public void Filters_ShouldHave_UniqueFilterIds()
    {
        Assert.IsTrue(_state!.Filters.Count > 0, "No filters returned.");
        var ids = _state!.Filters.Select(f => f.FilterId).ToList();
        var distinct = ids.Distinct().Count();
        Assert.AreEqual(ids.Count, distinct, "FilterId values are not unique.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void Filters_ShouldHave_NonNullCoreProperties()
    {
        foreach (var f in _state!.Filters)
        {
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(f.FilterKey), $"Filter {f.FilterId}: FilterKey is null/empty.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(f.Name), $"Filter {f.FilterId}: Name is null/empty.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(f.LayerKey), $"Filter {f.FilterId}: LayerKey is null/empty.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(f.SubLayerKey), $"Filter {f.FilterId}: SubLayerKey is null/empty.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(f.Action), $"Filter {f.FilterId}: Action is null/empty.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(f.Flags), $"Filter {f.FilterId}: Flags is null/empty.");
        }
    }

    // ── ProviderContexts ────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public void ProviderContexts_ShouldHave_NonNullCoreProperties()
    {
        if (_state!.ProviderContexts.Count == 0)
        {
            Assert.Inconclusive("No provider contexts on this system.");
        }

        foreach (var ctx in _state!.ProviderContexts)
        {
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(ctx.ProviderContextKey),
                $"ProviderContext {ctx.ProviderContextId}: ProviderContextKey is null/empty.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(ctx.Name),
                $"ProviderContext {ctx.ProviderContextId}: Name is null/empty.");

            if (ctx.TypeName == "GENERAL_CONTEXT")
            {
                Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(ctx.ProviderKey),
                    $"ProviderContext {ctx.ProviderContextId} (GENERAL_CONTEXT): ProviderKey is null/empty.");
                Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(ctx.DataBufferHex),
                    $"ProviderContext {ctx.ProviderContextId} (GENERAL_CONTEXT): DataBufferHex is null/empty.");
            }
        }
    }

    // ── Callouts ────────────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public void Callouts_ShouldHave_NonNullKeyAndName()
    {
        Assert.IsTrue(_state!.Callouts.Count > 0, "No callouts returned.");

        foreach (var c in _state!.Callouts)
        {
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.CalloutKey), $"Callout: CalloutKey is null/empty.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.Name), $"Callout {c.CalloutKey}: Name is null/empty.");
        }
    }

    // ── NetEvents ───────────────────────────────────────────

    [TestMethod]
    public void NetEvents_ShouldHave_NonNullCoreProperties()
    {
        if (_state!.NetEvents.Count == 0)
        {
            Assert.Inconclusive("No net events captured on this system (net event collection may be disabled).");
        }

        foreach (var e in _state!.NetEvents)
        {
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(e.Timestamp), "NetEvent: Timestamp is null/empty.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(e.EventType), "NetEvent: EventType is null/empty.");
            Assert.IsTrue(Enum.IsDefined(typeof(FWP_IP_VERSION), e.IpVersion),
                $"NetEvent: IpVersion {e.IpVersion} is not a defined enum value.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(e.ProtocolName), "NetEvent: ProtocolName is null/empty.");
        }
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void NetEvents_DropOrAllow_ShouldHave_FilterIdAndLayerId()
    {
        if (_state!.NetEvents.Count == 0)
        {
            Assert.Inconclusive("No net events captured on this system.");
        }

        var classifiedEvents = _state!.NetEvents
            .Where(e => e.EventType is "CLASSIFY_DROP" or "CLASSIFY_ALLOW")
            .ToList();

        if (classifiedEvents.Count == 0)
        {
            Assert.Inconclusive("No DROP/ALLOW events found to validate FilterId/LayerId.");
        }

        foreach (var e in classifiedEvents)
        {
            Assert.IsNotNull(e.FilterId, $"NetEvent {e.EventType} at {e.Timestamp}: FilterId is null.");
            Assert.IsNotNull(e.LayerId, $"NetEvent {e.EventType} at {e.Timestamp}: LayerId is null.");
        }
    }
}

using System.Security.Principal;
using Components.Windows.Win32Api;

namespace Components.Windows.Tests.Win32Api;

/// <summary>
/// Integration tests for WfpService.GetEngineOptions().
/// Requires elevated (Administrator) execution.
/// </summary>
[TestClass]
public class WfpService_GetEngineOptionsTests
{
    private static List<WfpEngineOption>? _options;
    private static IWfp? _wfp;

    [ClassInitialize]
    public static void ConnectAndQuery(TestContext _)
    {
        using var identity = WindowsIdentity.GetCurrent();
        var principal = new WindowsPrincipal(identity);
        if (!principal.IsInRole(WindowsBuiltInRole.Administrator))
        {
            Assert.Inconclusive("WFP engine options require Administrator privileges. Run tests elevated.");
        }

        _wfp = new WfpService();
        var connected = _wfp.Connect();
        Assert.IsTrue(connected, $"WFP engine connection failed ({_wfp.LastErrorName}).");
        _options = _wfp.GetEngineOptions();
    }

    [ClassCleanup]
    public static void Cleanup() => _wfp?.Dispose();

    [TestMethod]
    public void GetEngineOptions_ShouldReturn_NonEmptyList()
    {
        Assert.IsTrue(_options!.Count > 0, "Expected at least one engine option.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void GetEngineOptions_ShouldContain_CollectNetEvents_Enabled()
    {
        var option = _options!.Find(o => o.Name == "COLLECT_NET_EVENTS");
        Assert.IsNotNull(option, "COLLECT_NET_EVENTS option not found.");
        Assert.AreEqual(1u, option.Value, $"COLLECT_NET_EVENTS expected Enabled (1), got {option.Value} ({option.Description}).");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void GetEngineOptions_ShouldHave_UniqueNames()
    {
        var names = _options!.Select(o => o.Name).ToList();
        var distinct = names.Distinct().Count();
        Assert.AreEqual(names.Count, distinct, "Engine option names are not unique.");
    }

    [TestMethod]
    public void GetEngineOptions_AllItems_ShouldHave_NonEmptyNameAndDescription()
    {
        foreach (var opt in _options!)
        {
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(opt.Name), "An engine option has a null/empty Name.");
            Assert.IsFalse(string.IsNullOrEmpty(opt.Description), $"Engine option '{opt.Name}' has a null/empty Description.");
        }
    }
}

syntax = "proto3";

package compliance.v1;

import "google/protobuf/timestamp.proto";

// Shared enums

enum ComplianceState {
  COMPLIANCE_STATE_HIDDEN = 0;
  COMPLIANCE_STATE_NOT_EVALUATED = 16;     // 0x10
  COMPLIANCE_STATE_NOT_APPLICABLE = 32;    // 0x20
  COMPLIANCE_STATE_COMPLIANT = 48;         // 0x30
  COMPLIANCE_STATE_WARNING = 64;           // 0x40
  COMPLIANCE_STATE_NOT_COMPLIANT = 80;     // 0x50
  COMPLIANCE_STATE_LOADING = 255;          // 0xFF
}

enum SecureBootState {
  SECURE_BOOT_STATE_DISABLED = 0;
  SECURE_BOOT_STATE_ENABLED = 1;
  SECURE_BOOT_STATE_UNKNOWN = 255;
}

enum ServiceStatus {
  SERVICE_STATUS_NONE = 0;
  SERVICE_STATUS_STOPPED = 1;
  SERVICE_STATUS_START_PENDING = 2;
  SERVICE_STATUS_STOP_PENDING = 3;
  SERVICE_STATUS_RUNNING = 4;
  SERVICE_STATUS_CONTINUE_PENDING = 5;
  SERVICE_STATUS_PAUSE_PENDING = 6;
  SERVICE_STATUS_PAUSED = 7;
  SERVICE_STATUS_UNKNOWN = 255;
}

enum FirewallState {
  FIREWALL_STATE_OFF = 0;
  FIREWALL_STATE_ON = 1;
  FIREWALL_STATE_UNKNOWN = 255;
}

enum RebootPendingState {
  REBOOT_PENDING_STATE_NOT_PENDING = 0;
  REBOOT_PENDING_STATE_PENDING = 1;
  REBOOT_PENDING_STATE_UNKNOWN = 255;
}

enum ProductType {
  PRODUCT_TYPE_UNKNOWN = 0;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_ULTIMATE = 1;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_HOME_BASIC = 2;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_HOME_PREMIUM = 3;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_ENTERPRISE = 4;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_HOME_BASIC_N = 5;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_BUSINESS = 6;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_STANDARD = 7;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_DATACENTER = 8;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SMALLBUSINESS_SERVER = 9;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_ENTERPRISE = 10;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_STARTER = 11;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_DATACENTER_CORE = 12;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_STANDARD_CORE = 13;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_ENTERPRISE_CORE = 14;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_WEB = 15;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_HOME_SERVER = 16;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_STORAGE_EXPRESS = 17;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_STORAGE_STANDARD = 18;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_STORAGE_WORKGROUP = 19;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_STORAGE_DATACENTER = 20;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_PROFESSIONAL = 48;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_PROFESSIONAL_N = 49;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_STARTER_N = 50;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_HOME_PREMIUM_N = 51;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_ENTERPRISE_N = 52;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_PROFESSIONAL_WMC = 53;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_EDUCATION = 54;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_EDUCATION_N = 55;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_IOT_CORE = 56;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_IOT_ENTERPRISE = 57;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_IOT_ENTERPRISE_S = 58;
  PRODUCT_TYPE_SERVER_WEB_CORE = 59;
}

enum Architecture {
  ARCHITECTURE_X86 = 0;
  ARCHITECTURE_X64 = 1;
  ARCHITECTURE_ARM = 2;
  ARCHITECTURE_ARM64 = 3;
}

enum ActiveDirectoryScope {
  ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_SCOPE_COMPUTER = 0;
  ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_SCOPE_USER = 1;
}

// How a Chromium browser extension was installed. Mirrors Chromium's
// extensions::mojom::ManifestLocation enum
// (extensions/common/mojom/manifest.mojom). Persisted by Chrome/Edge in
// Preferences / Secure Preferences at extensions.settings.<id>.location.
enum ManifestLocation {
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_UNKNOWN = 0;                  // kInvalidLocation
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_INTERNAL = 1;                 // Web Store / Edge Add-ons
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_EXTERNAL_PREF = 2;            // external_extensions.json sideload
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_EXTERNAL_REGISTRY = 3;        // HKLM/HKCU registry sideload
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_UNPACKED = 4;                 // chrome://extensions developer mode
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_COMPONENT = 5;                // built-in browser component
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_EXTERNAL_PREF_DOWNLOAD = 6;   // external + update_url
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_EXTERNAL_POLICY_DOWNLOAD = 7; // forced by GPO (download)
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_COMMAND_LINE = 8;             // --load-extension
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_EXTERNAL_POLICY = 9;          // forced by GPO (local CRX)
  MANIFEST_LOCATION_EXTERNAL_COMPONENT = 10;      // first-party shipped component
}

// Bitmask of reasons a Chromium extension may be disabled. Mirrors
// extensions::disable_reason::DisableReason
// (extensions/browser/disable_reason.h). Persisted by Chrome/Edge in
// Preferences/Secure Preferences at extensions.settings.<id>.disable_reasons
// (storage may be a single int bitmask or, in recent Chromium versions, a
// list of int values OR'd together — crbug.com/372186532).
enum ExtensionDisableReason {
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_NONE = 0;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_USER_ACTION = 1;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_PERMISSIONS_INCREASE = 2;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_RELOAD = 4;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_UNSUPPORTED_REQUIREMENT = 8;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_SIDELOAD_WIPEOUT = 16;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_DEPRECATED_UNKNOWN_FROM_SYNC = 32;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_NOT_VERIFIED = 256;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_GREYLIST = 512;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_CORRUPTED = 1024;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_REMOTE_INSTALL = 2048;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_EXTERNAL_EXTENSION = 8192;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_UPDATE_REQUIRED_BY_POLICY = 16384;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_CUSTODIAN_APPROVAL_REQUIRED = 32768;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_BLOCKED_BY_POLICY = 65536;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_REINSTALL = 524288;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_NOT_ALLOWLISTED = 1048576;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_DEPRECATED_NOT_ASH_KEEPLISTED = 2097152;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_PUBLISHED_IN_STORE_REQUIRED_BY_POLICY = 4194304;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_UNSUPPORTED_MANIFEST_VERSION = 8388608;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_UNSUPPORTED_DEVELOPER_EXTENSION = 16777216;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_UNKNOWN = 33554432;
  EXTENSION_DISABLE_REASON_BLOCKED_BY_CLOUD_POLICY_CHECK = 67108864;
}

// Server-side blocklist state assigned by Chrome's Safe Browsing CRX list
// service. Mirrors extensions::BlocklistState
// (extensions/browser/blocklist_state.h). Plain enum, NOT a bitmask.
enum ExtensionBlocklistState {
  EXTENSION_BLOCKLIST_STATE_NOT_BLOCKLISTED = 0;
  EXTENSION_BLOCKLIST_STATE_MALWARE = 1;
  EXTENSION_BLOCKLIST_STATE_SECURITY_VULNERABILITY = 2;
  EXTENSION_BLOCKLIST_STATE_CWS_POLICY_VIOLATION = 3;
  EXTENSION_BLOCKLIST_STATE_POTENTIALLY_UNWANTED = 4;
  EXTENSION_BLOCKLIST_STATE_UNKNOWN = 5;
}

enum ExtendedNameFormat {
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_UNKNOWN = 0;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_FULLY_QUALIFIED_DN = 1;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_SAM_COMPATIBLE = 2;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_DISPLAY = 3;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_UNIQUE_ID = 6;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_CANONICAL = 7;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_USER_PRINCIPAL = 8;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_CANONICAL_EX = 9;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_SERVICE_PRINCIPAL = 10;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_DNS_DOMAIN = 12;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_GIVEN_NAME = 13;
  EXTENDED_NAME_FORMAT_SURNAME = 14;
}

// Shared message types

message ErrorDetail {
  string code = 1;
  string message = 2;
  optional string correlation_id = 3;
}

message SecurityCenterProduct {
  string name = 1;
  string path_to_signed_product_exe = 2;
  uint32 product_state = 3;
  string product_status = 4;
  string signature_status = 5;
  string product_owner = 6;
}

message NetFwProduct {
  string name = 1;
  string path_to_signed_product_exe = 2;
  repeated uint32 rule_categories = 3;
}

message BrowserExtension {
  optional string browser = 1;
  optional string user_profile = 2;
  optional string browser_profile = 3;
  optional string extension_id = 4;
  optional string name = 5;
  optional string version = 6;
  optional string sid = 7;
  optional string profile_image_path = 8;
  optional int32 manifest_version = 9;
  optional string description = 10;
  optional bool enabled = 11;
  optional string permissions = 12;
  optional string host_permissions = 13;
  optional string optional_permissions = 14;
  optional string optional_host_permissions = 15;
  optional string update_url = 16;
  optional google.protobuf.Timestamp install_date = 17;
  optional bool has_metadata_folder = 18;
  optional string background_type = 19;
  optional string content_script_matches = 20;
  optional string content_security_policy = 21;
  optional google.protobuf.Timestamp last_browser_profile_activity = 22;
  optional ManifestLocation location = 23;

  // ---- Raw Tier 1 metadata (Preferences / Secure Preferences) ----
  //
  // No textual translations of bitmasks/enums are exposed by design:
  //  * Derived booleans (from_webstore, was_installed_by_default,
  //    was_installed_by_oem) and creation_flag_names were removed
  //    because their values come from `creation_flags` bits which some
  //    Chromium forks (Edge in particular) reuse for fork-specific
  //    meanings, making the translation unsafe.
  //  * disable_reason_names and blocklist_state_name were also removed
  //    for consistency: any decoding is an opinion that should live in
  //    DB views/dashboards, not baked into the agent binary.
  //
  // Field numbers 24, 26, 28, 29, 30, 32 are reserved to prevent
  // accidental reuse with incompatible semantics if we ever revisit this.
  reserved 24, 26, 28, 29, 30, 32;
  reserved "from_webstore", "disable_reason_names", "blocklist_state_name",
           "was_installed_by_default", "was_installed_by_oem",
           "creation_flag_names";

  optional int32 disable_reasons = 25;            // raw bitmask
  optional int32 blocklist_state = 27;            // ExtensionBlocklistState as int
  optional int32 creation_flags = 31;             // raw bitmask, no name translation
  optional bool acknowledged = 33;
  optional string granted_api_permissions = 34;   // ", "-joined
  optional string granted_host_permissions = 35;  // ", "-joined

  // Raw integrity signal: presence of `_metadata/verified_contents.json`
  // (CRX fetched through the official store pipeline contains this file
  // with SHA-256 hashes signed by the store key). Decoding/scoring is
  // left to consumers.
  optional bool has_verified_contents = 36;
}

message GpExtensionsStatusEntry {
  optional string name = 1;
  optional string id = 2;
  optional string status = 3;
  optional google.protobuf.Timestamp last_policy_time = 4;
}

message WindowsSetupSnapshot {
  google.protobuf.Timestamp install_date = 1;
  string edition_id = 2;
  string display_version = 3;
  uint32 major_version_number = 4;
  uint32 minor_version_number = 5;
  string build_number = 6;
  string release = 7;
  string migration_scope = 8;
}

message AutomaticUpdateService {
  string name = 1;
  bool is_managed = 2;
  bool is_registered_with_au = 3;
  bool offers_windows_updates = 4;
  string service_id = 5;
  bool is_scan_package_service = 6;
  bool can_register_with_au = 7;
  string service_url = 8;
  optional bool is_default_au_service = 9;
}

message SecurityPackage {
  string name = 1;
  string comment = 2;
  uint32 capabilities = 3;
  uint32 version = 4;
  uint32 rpc_id = 5;
  uint32 max_token = 6;
}

message SccmComponentStatusEntry {
  optional string component = 1;
  optional string version = 2;
  optional string status = 3;
}

message SccmInventoryStatusEntry {
  string inventory_type = 1;
  optional google.protobuf.Timestamp last_cycle_started_date = 2;
  optional google.protobuf.Timestamp last_report_date = 3;
  optional int32 last_major_report_version = 4;
  optional int32 last_minor_report_version = 5;
}

message IdeExtension {
  optional string ide = 1;
  optional string sid = 2;
  optional string user_profile = 3;
  optional string profile_image_path = 4;
  optional string extension_id = 5;
  optional string name = 6;
  optional string publisher = 7;
  optional string version = 8;
  optional string description = 9;
  optional string categories = 10;
  optional google.protobuf.Timestamp install_date = 11;
  optional string source = 12;
  optional string publisher_display_name = 16;
  optional google.protobuf.Timestamp last_modified = 17;
  optional string engine_vscode = 18;
  optional bool has_wildcard_activation = 13;
  optional bool has_post_install_script = 14;
  optional int32 dependency_count = 15;
}
